prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离 LaTeX 渲染服务，记录 TeX 引擎、允许的包含指令、代理配置和编译进程网络身份。
prerequisites.en: Use an isolated LaTeX renderer and record the TeX engine, permitted inclusion directives, proxy configuration, and compiler process network identity.

prerequisites.zh: 准备带唯一请求令牌的自有 HTTP 回调与受控环回标记服务，并保留纯文本 URL 和本地文件包含对照。
prerequisites.en: Prepare an owned HTTP callback and controlled loopback marker with unique request tokens, retaining plain-text URL and local-file inclusion controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求渲染进程因远程包含指令主动连接受控服务，回调中的令牌、源地址与编译任务可关联；若测试内部地址，还需受控环回标记记录连接。文档里出现 URL、编译器报错、仅 DNS 查询、客户端浏览器取图、代理缓存内容或模型声称已获取都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the renderer process to connect to the controlled service because of a remote inclusion directive, with callback token, source identity, and compile job correlated; an internal-address test additionally requires the controlled loopback marker to log the connection. A URL in the document, compiler error, DNS lookup alone, browser-side fetch, proxy-cached content, or a model claiming retrieval is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 首次收到一个受控 HTTP 或环回标记请求后停止，不访问云元数据、真实内网端口或系统文件。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first controlled HTTP or loopback marker request; do not access cloud metadata, real internal ports, or system files.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试文档和渲染缓存，关闭回调/环回服务，撤销临时出站例外并销毁编译容器。
opsecTips.en: Delete test documents and render caches, shut down callback and loopback services, revoke temporary egress exceptions, and destroy the compiler container.

name.zh: LaTeX 远程资源包含 SSRF

description.zh: 用于验证服务端 LaTeX 渲染器是否会解析远程包含指令并代表应用访问受控或内部地址。
description.en: Tests whether a server-side LaTeX renderer resolves remote inclusion directives and makes requests to controlled or internal addresses.

overview.zh: 该记录不是通用 URL 字典，而是面向支持远程资源的 LaTeX 编译链。测试要区分应用下载资源、编译器解析包含指令和外部代理代取三个阶段，并以受控回连作为最低证据。
overview.en: This entry targets LaTeX compilation chains that support remote resources rather than generic URL fields. Testing separates application fetching, compiler inclusion, and proxy retrieval, with a controlled callback as the minimum evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 当用户可控的 TeX 内容进入启用了网络访问的渲染器时，包含指令可能让服务端请求内网、环回或云元数据地址。只有请求确由目标发出且响应影响渲染结果时，才能确认 SSRF。
vulnerability.en: When attacker-controlled TeX reaches a renderer with network access, inclusion directives may request loopback, internal, or cloud metadata addresses. SSRF is confirmed only when the target originates the request and the response affects rendering.

exploitation.zh: 1. 先向唯一受控 HTTPS 端点发送无害包含请求并记录 DNS、连接源与时间；2. 逐项提交原始指令集合，但仅使用实验室地址观察解析差异；3. 将回连、编译日志和输出文档关联。浏览器预取、运维代理或外部扫描器产生的访问属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Send a harmless inclusion request to a unique controlled HTTPS endpoint and record DNS, source, and time. 2. Submit the original directive set one item at a time using laboratory addresses only. 3. Correlate callbacks, compiler logs, and the rendered document. Browser prefetches, operational proxies, and external scanners are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 禁止渲染器访问网络并在隔离容器中执行编译；2. 对 TeX 语法采用允许列表并移除远程包含能力；3. 对出站流量实施域名与地址双重限制，同时阻断环回、私网和链路本地地址。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable renderer network access and compile in an isolated container. 2. Allowlist TeX syntax and remove remote inclusion features. 3. Restrict egress by both hostname and resolved address while blocking loopback, private, and link-local ranges.

description.zh: 定位接收 TeX 内容并在服务端完成编译的具体接口、进程与网络命名空间。
description.en: Identify the endpoint, process, and network namespace that accepts TeX and performs server-side compilation.

description.zh: 向一次性回连域提交原始远程包含指令，保留请求标识与编译任务编号。
description.en: Submit the original remote inclusion directive to a one-time callback domain and retain request and compilation identifiers.

description.zh: 比对 DNS 日志、连接源、编译日志与输出变化，排除客户端或代理访问。
description.en: Compare DNS logs, connection source, compiler logs, and output changes while excluding client or proxy traffic.

review.rationale: 原命令是特定 LaTeX 渲染上下文中的远程包含输入，可作为 SSRF 验证载荷保留。

prerequisites.zh: 在无外网、低权限、可销毁容器中固定 TeX 引擎和启动参数，明确 shell-escape、工作目录和系统调用审计。
prerequisites.en: Pin the TeX engine and launch flags in a disposable, low-privilege container without egress, documenting shell-escape, working directory, and system-call auditing.

prerequisites.zh: 以只创建随机临时标记文件的固定命令替代语料中的信息读取命令，并准备禁用 shell-escape 的同文档对照。
prerequisites.en: Replace corpus information-gathering commands with a fixed command that only creates a random temporary marker file, and retain the same document with shell-escape disabled as a control.

analysis.zh: 阳性是编译器实际启动了受控子进程并创建唯一标记，进程、系统调用与编译任务日志形成完整因果链。TeX 源码包含 write18、PDF 回显命令文本、编译错误、模拟输出、文件由测试脚本预先创建或容器正确拒绝执行都不是 RCE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the compiler actually starting the controlled child process and creating the unique marker, with process, syscall, and compile-job logs forming a complete causal chain. TeX source containing write18, command text reflected in a PDF, compile errors, simulated output, a marker precreated by the harness, or correct container rejection is not RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 标记文件首次由编译子进程创建后停止，不执行 id、文件读取、网络连接或持久化命令。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the marker file is first created by the compiler child process; do not execute identity, file-read, network, or persistence commands.

opsecTips.zh: 终止编译进程，删除文档、标记和输出文件，清理审计记录并销毁容器，恢复 shell-escape 禁用。
opsecTips.en: Terminate compiler processes, delete documents, markers, and output files, clear audit records, destroy the container, and restore disabled shell-escape.

name.zh: LaTeX Shell Escape 命令执行

description.zh: 验证服务端 TeX 编译器是否错误启用 shell escape，使文档指令能够启动操作系统进程。
description.en: Tests whether a server-side TeX compiler incorrectly enables shell escape and allows document directives to start operating-system processes.

overview.zh: 该记录针对 TeX 的写出执行能力，不应作为普通业务逻辑案例展示。评估应先确认编译引擎、启动参数、工作目录与容器边界，再使用无害标记观察子进程是否由编译器创建。
overview.en: This entry concerns TeX write-and-execute capability rather than business logic. Assessment first identifies the engine, launch flags, working directory, and container boundary, then uses a harmless marker to observe compiler-created processes.

vulnerability.zh: 若渲染服务以启用 shell escape 的方式编译不可信文档，攻击者可让编译进程执行系统命令，并继承服务账号的文件与网络权限。仅出现 TeX 语法错误或命令字符串回显不代表执行成功。
vulnerability.en: If a rendering service compiles untrusted documents with shell escape enabled, an attacker can execute system commands with the service account's file and network privileges. A TeX error or reflected command string does not prove execution.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离环境建立正常文档编译基线并记录进程树；2. 从原始集合选择只创建随机标记文件的测试项，逐次提交且不访问敏感数据；3. 核对文件所有者、编译任务和子进程审计。只有服务器侧副作用与任务一致时才确认，客户端生成文件属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Establish a normal compilation baseline in isolation and record the process tree. 2. Select a test item from the original set that creates only a random marker file, submitting one at a time without accessing sensitive data. 3. Verify file ownership, compilation job, and child-process audit events. Confirm only server-side effects tied to the job; client-created files are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 永久关闭 shell escape 与同类外部执行选项；2. 在无特权、只读文件系统和无网络容器中运行编译器；3. 对宏包和控制序列建立允许列表，并限制 CPU、内存、进程数与执行时间。
mitigation.en: 1. Permanently disable shell escape and equivalent external-execution options. 2. Run the compiler unprivileged in a read-only, networkless container. 3. Allowlist packages and control sequences and limit CPU, memory, processes, and execution time.

description.zh: 确认编译器参数中未启用外部命令能力，并采集正常任务的进程树与文件写入。
description.en: Confirm external-command features are disabled and collect the normal job's process tree and file writes.

description.zh: 使用原始指令中的最小测试变体创建随机标记，不读取系统文件也不建立外连。
description.en: Use the smallest original directive variant to create a random marker without reading system files or opening connections.

description.zh: 将标记文件、服务账号、父子进程关系和任务标识关联，确认副作用来自服务端。
description.en: Correlate the marker, service account, parent-child process relationship, and job identifier to confirm a server-side effect.

review.rationale: 原命令属于 TeX shell escape 的直接执行测试，应归入 RCE 并保留为上下文限定载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 使用自有 RSA 测试密钥、固定端点和已知有效 PKCS#1 v1.5 密文，确保所有变体长度与传输路径一致。
prerequisites.en: Use an owned RSA test key, fixed endpoint, and known-valid PKCS#1 v1.5 ciphertext, ensuring every variant has equal length and the same transport path.

prerequisites.zh: 对受控字节变体重复采集状态、正文、连接行为和时延，将错误文本目录只作为聚类特征之一。
prerequisites.en: Repeatedly collect status, body, connection behavior, and latency for controlled byte variants, using the error-text catalog as only one clustering feature.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具证据是不同填充有效性类别在重复样本中形成稳定可区分的响应簇，并与测试密钥下的已知真值显著相关。日志中出现 RSA/PKCS 字样、一次错误不同、TLS 握手失败、长度不等的请求、限流或网络抖动都不能证明 Bleichenbacher oracle。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is stable, distinguishable response clusters for different padding-validity classes across repeated samples, significantly correlated with ground truth under the test key. RSA or PKCS text in logs, one different error, TLS handshake failure, unequal request lengths, rate limiting, or network jitter does not prove a Bleichenbacher oracle.

opsecTips.zh: 最小样本已达到预设分类置信度后停止，不继续进行明文恢复或大规模自适应查询。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the minimum sample set reaches the predefined classification confidence; do not continue to plaintext recovery or large adaptive queries.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试密文、私钥副本和响应聚类数据，清除连接缓存并恢复统一错误与速率限制。
opsecTips.en: Delete test ciphertexts, private-key copies, and response-clustering data, clear connection caches, and restore uniform errors and rate limits.

name.zh: PKCS#1 v1.5 Oracle 错误签名库

description.zh: 整理可能暴露 RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 解密分支的错误文本，用于日志与响应聚类，不是可直接发送的攻击请求。
description.en: Catalogs error text that may reveal RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 decryption branches for response and log clustering; it is not a directly sendable attack request.

overview.zh: 原内容全部是错误消息关键词，作用是辅助识别解密路径差异。可靠评估需要把这些字符串与同一端点、同一密文长度、不同填充结构的响应状态、长度和时序联合分析。
overview.en: The original content consists entirely of error-message keywords used to identify divergent decryption paths. Reliable assessment combines them with status, length, and timing from the same endpoint and equal-length ciphertext variants.

vulnerability.zh: RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 服务若对格式正确与错误的密文给出可区分响应，可能形成自适应选择密文 oracle。单独在源码、日志字典或通用 TLS 错误页中发现关键词并不能证明 oracle 存在。
vulnerability.en: An RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 service may expose an adaptive chosen-ciphertext oracle when valid and invalid encodings produce distinguishable responses. Finding a keyword in source, a log catalog, or a generic TLS page does not prove an oracle.

exploitation.zh: 1. 导入原始错误签名作为响应聚类标签；2. 使用授权测试密钥生成等长、仅填充结构不同的样本并重复请求；3. 比较状态、正文、连接行为与时延分布。只有差异稳定且由解密分支造成才成立，负载均衡抖动和限流是常见误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Import the original error signatures as response-clustering labels. 2. Generate equal-length samples with an authorized test key that differ only in padding structure and repeat requests. 3. Compare status, body, connection behavior, and latency distributions. Confirm only stable decryption-branch differences; load-balancer jitter and rate limiting are common false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 停用 RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 密钥交换或解密接口，迁移到具备现代安全性质的方案；2. 对所有解密失败返回不可区分结果并采用恒定时间处理；3. 增加速率限制、密钥轮换和 oracle 回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Retire RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 key exchange or decryption interfaces in favor of modern schemes. 2. Return indistinguishable failures with constant-time handling. 3. Add rate limits, key rotation, and oracle regression tests.

description.zh: 固定端点、密文长度和连接条件，预先定义状态、正文长度、时延与断连指标。
description.en: Fix endpoint, ciphertext length, and connection conditions, then define status, body length, timing, and disconnect metrics.

description.zh: 将原始消息列表导入分析工具作为标签，不把字符串本身发送为加密载荷。
description.en: Import the original message list into the analysis tool as labels rather than sending the strings as cryptographic payloads.

attackChain.payload:
Bad message
RSA error
RSA decryption error
PKCS#1 error
PKCS1 error
Invalid PKCS#1 padding
RSA padding error
Key decryption error
Private key error
Certificate error
SSL error
TLS error
Handshake error

description.zh: 对等长测试密文重复采样并做统计对照，排除网关、限流和网络抖动。
description.en: Repeat sampling with equal-length test ciphertexts and statistical controls to exclude gateways, throttling, and network jitter.

review.rationale: 记录只包含错误文本特征，不含构造密文或请求方式，应迁移为密码学响应分析工具资料。

prerequisites.zh: 确定触发输入的具体 JavaScript 正则、运行时版本和调用路径，在独立 worker 中限制 CPU、内存与最长执行时间。
prerequisites.en: Identify the exact JavaScript regex, runtime version, and call path reached by input, using an isolated worker with CPU, memory, and execution-time limits.

prerequisites.zh: 从短失败匹配开始递增长度，交错运行安全正则、成功匹配和随机后缀对照，采集事件循环延迟与 CPU。
prerequisites.en: Start with short failing matches and increase length, interleaving safe-regex, successful-match, and random-suffix controls while collecting event-loop delay and CPU.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求失败匹配时长随输入长度呈可重复的超线性或指数增长，并能定位到同一正则的回溯和事件循环阻塞。单次超时、冷启动、GC、其他请求负载、网络延迟、固定长度字符串较慢或异常处理开销都属于假阳性边界。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires reproducible superlinear or exponential failed-match growth with input length, localized to backtracking in the same regex and event-loop blocking. One timeout, cold start, garbage collection, other request load, network latency, one slower fixed-length string, or exception-handling overhead is a false-positive boundary.

opsecTips.zh: 增长曲线达到预设 CPU/时延阈值后停止，不发送语料最大长度或并发放大请求。
opsecTips.en: Stop when the growth curve reaches the predefined CPU or latency threshold; do not send the corpus maximum or concurrent amplification requests.

opsecTips.zh: 终止测试 worker，清除队列和性能 trace，恢复资源限制并替换或约束风险正则。
opsecTips.en: Terminate the test worker, clear queues and performance traces, restore resource limits, and replace or constrain the risky regex.

name.zh: JavaScript 正则表达式拒绝服务
name.en: JavaScript Regular Expression Denial of Service

description.zh: 以渐增长度的近似匹配字符串验证 JavaScript 正则是否发生灾难性回溯，并用事件循环延迟作为证据。
description.en: Uses near-matching strings of increasing length to test JavaScript regular expressions for catastrophic backtracking, with event-loop delay as evidence.

overview.zh: 该集合是 JavaScript 正则引擎的对抗输入，不是业务流程绕过。测试应围绕具体正则、输入长度和事件循环阻塞建立增长曲线，避免一次超长请求直接拖垮共享环境。
overview.en: This collection contains adversarial inputs for JavaScript regex engines rather than business-flow bypasses. Testing builds a growth curve for a specific regex, input length, and event-loop blocking without sending one oversized request to shared infrastructure.

vulnerability.zh: 包含重叠量词或歧义分支的正则在失败匹配时可能出现指数级回溯，使单个请求长时间占用 Node.js 主线程。仅看到高延迟但没有随长度增长的可重复曲线，不能确认 ReDoS。
vulnerability.en: Regexes with overlapping quantifiers or ambiguous alternation can backtrack exponentially on failed matches and occupy the Node.js main thread. High latency without a reproducible input-length growth curve does not confirm ReDoS.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离副本上记录正常输入的匹配时间与事件循环延迟；2. 从原始字符串中按长度递增逐个测试，并设置严格超时；3. 重复采样后比较增长率、CPU 和请求队列。网络抖动、冷启动或下游慢查询造成的延迟应判为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record match time and event-loop delay for normal input on an isolated replica. 2. Test original strings one at a time in increasing length with a strict timeout. 3. Repeat samples and compare growth rate, CPU, and request queueing. Network jitter, cold starts, and slow downstream queries are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 重写存在嵌套量词或重叠分支的表达式并采用线性时间引擎；2. 限制输入长度和正则执行时间；3. 把高风险匹配移出主线程，并为延迟斜率与事件循环阻塞建立回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Rewrite expressions with nested quantifiers or overlapping alternatives and prefer a linear-time engine. 2. Limit input length and regex execution time. 3. Move risky matching off the main thread and add regression tests for latency slope and event-loop blocking.

description.zh: 从接口到代码路径确认待测表达式、失败匹配条件以及是否运行在主线程。
description.en: Trace the endpoint to the exact expression, failed-match condition, and whether execution occurs on the main thread.

description.zh: 按长度顺序提交原始近似匹配字符串，每次记录独立计时并在阈值前停止。
description.en: Submit original near-matching strings in length order, recording isolated timings and stopping before the threshold.

attackChain.payload:
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa!
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaX
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa1
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa@
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa#
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa\t
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa\n

description.zh: 关联匹配时延、CPU、事件循环延迟和队列长度，判断是否存在超线性增长。
description.en: Correlate match latency, CPU, event-loop delay, and queue depth to determine whether growth is superlinear.

review.rationale: 原命令是可直接用于 JavaScript 正则失败匹配的测试输入，应归入拒绝服务载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 创建账户 A、账户 B 及各自带唯一 canary 的对象，记录 read/update/delete 的对象级授权矩阵。
prerequisites.en: Create accounts A and B with uniquely marked objects and record the object-level authorization matrix for read, update, and delete operations.

prerequisites.zh: 仅由账户 A 替换为已知的账户 B 测试 ID，保持方法、字段、租户和认证 token 不变，并采集后端主体/对象审计。
prerequisites.en: From account A, replace only the object ID with account B's known test ID while keeping method, fields, tenant, and token fixed, and collect backend principal and object auditing.

analysis.zh: 阳性是账户 A 在无授权情况下读取或作用于账户 B 的 canary 对象，审计明确显示 A 主体与 B 对象同时出现。ID 连续、存在/不存在响应不同、返回 404/403、公开对象按设计可见、缓存页面或客户端隐藏按钮被绕过但服务器拒绝都不是 IDOR。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is account A reading or acting on account B's canary object without authorization, with auditing explicitly showing principal A and object B together. Sequential IDs, existence differentials, HTTP 404 or 403, intentionally public objects, cached pages, or bypassed client controls followed by server rejection is not IDOR.

opsecTips.zh: 首次读取一个无敏感字段的外部 canary，或完成一个可回滚测试动作后停止，不枚举相邻真实 ID。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first foreign canary read without sensitive fields or one reversible test action; do not enumerate adjacent real IDs.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚对象动作，删除两账户与 fixture，清除缓存和审计令牌，并恢复每次请求的主体-对象授权。
opsecTips.en: Roll back object actions, delete both accounts and fixtures, clear caches and audit tokens, and restore principal-to-object authorization on every request.

name.zh: 对象 ID 顺序枚举

description.zh: 使用顺序数字标识符检查对象级授权是否绑定当前主体，而不是把可预测 ID 本身当作漏洞。
description.en: Uses sequential numeric identifiers to test whether object-level authorization is bound to the current principal instead of treating predictable IDs as a vulnerability.

overview.zh: 顺序 ID 只提供测试候选，真正评估对象是服务端对每个读取、修改和删除操作执行的所有权检查。测试需要至少两个隔离账号和明确的自有对象、他人对象基线。
overview.en: Sequential IDs only provide test candidates; the real control is server-side ownership enforcement on every read, update, and delete operation. Testing requires at least two isolated accounts with known owned and foreign objects.

vulnerability.zh: 如果低权限用户替换对象 ID 后能够读取或改变另一主体的数据，就形成对象级授权缺失。响应为 200 但只返回公开字段、统一占位对象或无状态变化时，不足以确认越权。
vulnerability.en: An object-level authorization flaw exists when a low-privilege user can replace an object ID and read or change another principal's data. A 200 response containing only public fields, placeholders, or no state change is insufficient.

exploitation.zh: 1. 分别创建账号 A 与 B 的测试对象并记录标识；2. 以账号 A 逐项替换为原始 ID 候选，仅执行无害读取；3. 将响应对象所有者、字段差异和审计日志关联。公开目录、缓存数据或不存在对象的相同响应属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Create test objects for accounts A and B and record their identifiers. 2. As account A, replace the identifier with original candidates one at a time and perform harmless reads only. 3. Correlate owner, field differences, and audit logs. Public listings, cached data, and identical not-found responses are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对每次对象访问执行主体与对象关系授权，不依赖不可预测 ID；2. 使用间接引用并限制查询范围到当前租户；3. 为跨账号读取、修改和批量接口建立负向测试与审计告警。
mitigation.en: 1. Authorize every object access against the principal-object relationship rather than relying on unpredictable IDs. 2. Use indirect references and scope queries to the current tenant. 3. Add negative tests and audit alerts for cross-account reads, updates, and bulk endpoints.

description.zh: 创建两个隔离账号及各自对象，记录所有者、租户、标识和正常响应字段。
description.en: Create two isolated accounts and their objects, recording owner, tenant, identifier, and normal response fields.

description.zh: 在账号 A 的合法请求中逐项使用原始数字候选，保持方法与其他参数不变。
description.en: Use original numeric candidates one at a time in account A's valid request while keeping method and other parameters unchanged.

description.zh: 核对返回对象的真实所有者及服务端审计，只有访问账号 B 数据才构成越权。
description.en: Verify the returned object's true owner and server audit data; only access to account B's data constitutes a flaw.

review.rationale: 数字列表是对象引用替换载荷，但教程必须明确可预测 ID 不等同于越权。

prerequisites.zh: 在测试商户创建可预测、随机、已用、过期、用户绑定和不可转让的合成优惠码，并使用无真实价值账户。
prerequisites.en: Create predictable, random, used, expired, user-bound, and nontransferable synthetic coupon codes in a test merchant using accounts with no real value.

prerequisites.zh: 记录兑换请求、资格判断、唯一约束和不可变优惠账本，并为并发测试设置固定请求数与 idempotency key。
prerequisites.en: Record redemption requests, eligibility decisions, uniqueness constraints, and an immutable benefit ledger, with fixed request counts and idempotency keys for concurrency tests.

analysis.zh: 阳性是从序列独立预测的未公开码被未授权账户兑换、绑定码可跨用户转移、已用码可重放，或并发请求产生超过一次的账本优惠。格式看似连续、错误信息泄露存在性、购物车显示折扣但结算重算、重复请求都失败或只有一条最终账本记录均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is an unpublished code independently predicted from the sequence and redeemed by an unauthorized account, a bound code transferred across users, a used code replayed, or concurrent requests producing more than one ledger benefit. Sequential appearance, existence-leaking errors, a cart-only discount corrected at checkout, all duplicate requests failing, or a single final ledger entry is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 首次产生一笔未授权或重复的无价值优惠账本记录后停止，不批量猜码或创建真实订单。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first unauthorized or duplicate valueless benefit ledger entry; do not guess codes in bulk or create real orders.

opsecTips.zh: 冲正测试优惠，删除订单、账户和全部合成码，清除幂等缓存并恢复原子单次兑换约束。
opsecTips.en: Reverse test benefits, delete orders, accounts, and all synthetic codes, clear idempotency caches, and restore atomic single-redemption constraints.

name.zh: 优惠券与积分码枚举

description.zh: 检查优惠券或积分码是否可预测、是否绑定用户，以及兑换流程是否具备一次性与并发原子性。
description.en: Tests whether coupon or reward codes are predictable, user-bound, single-use, and atomically redeemed under concurrency.

overview.zh: 原记录因空尾 ID 和中英文缺失而难以理解，实际内容是一组可预测优惠码候选。评估重点不是猜中字符串，而是未授权兑换、跨用户转让、重复使用和并发超额发放。
overview.en: The original entry has an ambiguous trailing ID and missing English text, but its content is a predictable coupon-code candidate set. Assessment focuses on unauthorized redemption, cross-user transfer, reuse, and concurrent over-issuance.

vulnerability.zh: 当代码空间过小且兑换接口缺少速率限制、主体绑定或原子状态转换时，攻击者可能枚举有效权益或重复消费。仅返回“代码存在”但无法增加余额或生成订单折扣不构成实际影响。
vulnerability.en: When the code space is small and redemption lacks rate limits, principal binding, or atomic state transitions, valid benefits may be enumerated or reused. A message that a code exists without a balance or order discount does not establish impact.

exploitation.zh: 1. 创建只在实验室生效的一次性优惠码并记录所有者与额度；2. 从原始候选中低速逐项测试不存在、已使用和他人代码；3. 并发兑换仅在零价值代码上执行并核对账本。缓存提示、前端折扣预览或回滚事务属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Create a laboratory-only single-use coupon and record owner and value. 2. Test original candidates slowly against nonexistent, used, and other-user codes. 3. Exercise concurrency only with zero-value codes and verify the ledger. Cached messages, client-side discount previews, and rolled-back transactions are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用高熵不可预测代码并绑定活动、用户与有效期；2. 对查询和兑换统一限速且避免可枚举响应；3. 在数据库中通过唯一约束和条件更新实现一次性原子兑换，并审计异常失败率。
mitigation.en: 1. Use high-entropy codes bound to campaign, user, and expiry. 2. Rate-limit lookup and redemption with non-enumerable responses. 3. Enforce one-time atomic redemption with database constraints and conditional updates, and audit abnormal failure rates.

description.zh: 创建明确归属、可撤销且不会产生真实财务影响的优惠码与测试账号。
description.en: Create a clearly owned, reversible coupon and test account with no real financial impact.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始代码集合比较不存在、已用和跨用户场景的服务端响应。
description.en: Use the original code set one item at a time to compare nonexistent, used, and cross-user server responses.

description.zh: 检查兑换次数、余额和订单折扣的最终数据库状态，排除仅前端显示的变化。
description.en: Inspect final database state for redemption count, balance, and order discount, excluding client-only display changes.

review.rationale: 原集合可作为优惠码可预测性测试输入，保留为业务逻辑载荷并补全真实影响标准。

prerequisites.zh: 使用完全隔离的支付/账本沙箱和无真实结算渠道，建立商品服务端价格、币种、小数位和余额守恒基线。
prerequisites.en: Use a fully isolated payment and ledger sandbox without real settlement, establishing server-side product price, currency, scale, and balance-conservation baselines.

prerequisites.zh: 先单独测试零值、负值、极值和高精度，再以固定并发和 idempotency key 测试竞态，记录每一步账本。
prerequisites.en: Test zero, negative, extreme, and high-precision values individually before concurrency with fixed parallelism and idempotency keys, recording every ledger transition.

analysis.zh: 阳性是客户端金额改变服务端应付价格、负值/溢出产生非预期余额、精度处理破坏守恒，或并发让一项交易产生重复扣款/退款/记账，最终账本可证明不变量被破坏。仅前端显示异常、请求被拒绝、支付处于 pending、标准币种四舍五入、数据库回滚或重复请求只有一个已提交结果都不是漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is a client amount changing the server-authoritative price, a negative or overflow value creating an unintended balance, precision handling violating conservation, or concurrency causing duplicate charge, refund, or posting for one transaction, proven by the final ledger. A client-only display anomaly, rejection, pending payment, standard currency rounding, database rollback, or one committed result for duplicate requests is not a vulnerability.

opsecTips.zh: 第一次可重复的不变量破坏出现后停止，不增加金额、并发或连接到真实支付处理商。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first reproducible invariant violation; do not increase amount or concurrency or connect to a real payment processor.

opsecTips.zh: 冲正全部测试分录，删除订单与账户，清空幂等/队列状态并恢复价格服务、范围和精度校验。
opsecTips.en: Reverse all test ledger entries, delete orders and accounts, clear idempotency and queue state, and restore price-service, range, and precision validation.

name.zh: 金额边界与竞态一致性测试

description.zh: 使用零值、负值、极值和高精度金额检查服务端价格计算、舍入规则与并发事务一致性。
description.en: Uses zero, negative, extreme, and high-precision amounts to test server-side pricing, rounding, and transaction consistency under concurrency.

overview.zh: 原记录名称强调竞态，但内容主要是金额边界值；两者必须分开验证。先确认客户端金额是否被服务端忽略，再检查高精度舍入、上下限和并发提交是否破坏账本守恒。
overview.en: The original name emphasizes races while the content is primarily amount boundary values, so the two concerns must be tested separately. First verify server-side pricing, then rounding, bounds, and concurrent ledger conservation.

vulnerability.zh: 若服务端信任客户端金额、允许负数或在并发事务中重复扣减或入账，可能造成少付、退款放大或余额异常。请求被接受但最终订单按服务端价格结算时，不构成金额篡改。
vulnerability.en: If the server trusts client amounts, accepts negatives, or duplicates debit or credit under concurrency, underpayment, amplified refunds, or balance corruption may result. An accepted request settled at the server price is not tampering.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录固定商品的服务端报价、税费和账本基线；2. 逐项提交原始金额边界值，保持商品与数量不变；3. 对零价值订单做受控并发并核对最终借贷平衡。网关格式化、前端显示精度或已回滚授权不算漏洞证据。
exploitation.en: 1. Record server price, tax, and ledger baseline for a fixed test product. 2. Submit original amount boundary values one at a time while keeping product and quantity fixed. 3. Run controlled concurrency on zero-value orders and verify final debit-credit balance. Gateway formatting, display precision, and rolled-back authorizations are not evidence.

mitigation.zh: 1. 服务端根据受信商品与促销数据重新计算所有金额；2. 使用定点小数、明确舍入规则和范围验证；3. 通过幂等键、条件更新、唯一约束和事务锁保证支付与退款只记账一次。
mitigation.en: 1. Recalculate every amount server-side from trusted product and promotion data. 2. Use fixed-point decimals with explicit rounding and bounds. 3. Enforce single-entry payment and refund with idempotency keys, conditional updates, unique constraints, and transaction locking.

description.zh: 选用零价值测试商品并记录服务端报价、税费、余额和当前事务版本。
description.en: Use a zero-value test product and record server price, tax, balance, and current transaction version.

description.zh: 逐项替换请求金额为原始边界值，其他商品、数量和身份参数保持不变。
description.en: Replace the request amount with original boundary values one at a time while holding product, quantity, and identity constant.

description.zh: 比较授权、订单与余额的最终状态，确认是否存在少付、重复入账或异常退款。
description.en: Compare final authorization, order, and balance states for underpayment, duplicate credit, or abnormal refund.

review.rationale: 原数值集合是金额边界测试载荷；竞态结论必须通过原子账本证据另行确认。

prerequisites.zh: 为两个合成账户采集多批服务端签发 token/session，记录签发顺序、时钟、节点、过期与主体映射。
prerequisites.en: Collect multiple batches of server-issued tokens or sessions for two synthetic accounts, recording issuance order, clock, node, expiry, and principal mapping.

prerequisites.zh: 预先划分训练与留出样本、随机基线和尝试上限，只在固定只读 canary 端点验证未见候选。
prerequisites.en: Predefine training and holdout samples, a random baseline, and an attempt cap, validating unseen candidates only at a fixed read-only canary endpoint.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求由序列模型生成的未见候选显著优于随机基线，并映射到另一合成账户的有效会话且读取 canary。token 名称连续、字典中存在某值、响应错误不同、匿名会话返回 200、已观察 token 重放或猜测全部 401 都不是可预测会话证据。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an unseen candidate generated by the sequence model to outperform random baseline significantly, map to another synthetic account's valid session, and read the canary. Sequential token names, a value in the dictionary, different response errors, anonymous HTTP 200, replay of an observed token, or guesses all returning HTTP 401 is not predictable-session evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 一个留出候选首次映射到合成会话后停止，不遍历后续序号或访问非 canary 资源。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one holdout candidate first maps to a synthetic session; do not enumerate later numbers or access non-canary resources.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销全部采样会话，删除序列数据与模型缓存，清理限速状态并恢复 CSPRNG、过期和主体绑定。
opsecTips.en: Revoke all sampled sessions, delete sequence data and model caches, clear rate-limit state, and restore CSPRNG generation, expiry, and principal binding.

name.zh: 可预测 Token 与 Session 标识枚举
name.en: Predictable Token and Session Identifier Enumeration

description.zh: 使用顺序令牌候选检查会话标识的熵、主体绑定、失效处理与服务端授权，而非将字符串命中直接定性。
description.en: Uses sequential token candidates to test identifier entropy, principal binding, invalidation, and server-side authorization instead of treating a string match as proof.

overview.zh: 该集合由顺序 token 与 session 字符串组成，适合验证测试环境中的可预测标识。评估必须区分无效令牌、匿名会话、已失效会话和其他测试账号的有效会话。
overview.en: This collection contains sequential token and session strings for testing predictable identifiers. Assessment distinguishes invalid tokens, anonymous sessions, expired sessions, and valid sessions belonging to another test account.

vulnerability.zh: 若令牌空间可枚举且接口缺少速率限制，攻击者可能命中其他主体的活动会话；若服务端还未绑定设备、用途或权限，就会导致账户接管。仅错误消息不同或创建新匿名会话不是泄露。
vulnerability.en: If the token space is enumerable and lacks rate limits, another principal's active session may be found; missing device, purpose, or privilege binding can then cause account takeover. Different errors or a newly created anonymous session are not leakage.

exploitation.zh: 1. 为两个隔离账号签发并记录测试会话，同时准备过期样本；2. 低速提交原始候选，每次清除客户端状态；3. 核对服务端会话主体、签发时间和审计事件。只有候选继承另一个账号权限才成立，统一 200 或匿名身份属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Issue and record test sessions for two isolated accounts and prepare an expired sample. 2. Submit original candidates slowly, clearing client state each time. 3. Verify server-side session principal, issue time, and audit events. Confirm only inheritance of another account's privileges; generic 200 responses or anonymous identities are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用密码学安全随机数生成足够高熵的会话标识；2. 登录、提权和密码变更后轮换并撤销旧会话；3. 对令牌验证实施限速、用途与主体绑定、短有效期以及异常枚举告警。
mitigation.en: 1. Generate sufficiently high-entropy session identifiers with a cryptographically secure random source. 2. Rotate and revoke sessions after login, privilege changes, and password changes. 3. Apply rate limits, purpose and principal binding, short lifetimes, and enumeration alerts.

description.zh: 为两个测试账号分别建立活动与过期会话，并记录服务端主体映射。
description.en: Create active and expired sessions for two test accounts and record the server-side principal mapping.

description.zh: 在无残留 Cookie 的客户端中逐项提交原始 token 与 session 字符串。
description.en: Submit original token and session strings one at a time from a client with no residual cookies.

description.zh: 通过受保护的身份查询和服务端日志确认候选是否获得另一个账号权限。
description.en: Use a protected identity endpoint and server logs to determine whether a candidate gains another account's privileges.

review.rationale: 顺序令牌候选可保留为认证测试载荷，但必须通过服务端主体映射确认影响。

prerequisites.zh: 固定 Node.js 版本、JSON parser 与 deep-merge 库，在可重启进程中记录输入对象、目标对象和原型描述符。
prerequisites.en: Pin the Node.js version, JSON parser, and deep-merge library in a restartable process, recording input objects, merge targets, and prototype descriptors.

prerequisites.zh: 使用无权限含义的随机 sentinel 属性，检查合并前后新建对象及后续独立请求，并保留普通嵌套键对照。
prerequisites.en: Use a random sentinel property with no authorization meaning, inspecting fresh objects and a later independent request before and after merging, with an ordinary nested-key control.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求特殊键使 sentinel 出现在未显式赋值的新对象或后续请求中，并能通过原型链和合并调用日志定位；若评估影响，还需 sentinel 驱动无副作用 canary。输入对象自身拥有该字段、响应回显 JSON、解析器接受 `__proto__` 但丢弃、仅当前对象改变或 admin 字样出现都不是原型污染。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the special key to make the sentinel appear on a fresh object or later independent request without explicit assignment, traceable through the prototype chain and merge-call logs; impact additionally requires the sentinel to drive a side-effect-free canary. The input object owning the field, reflected JSON, a parser accepting then discarding __proto__, only the current object changing, or admin text appearing is not prototype pollution.

opsecTips.zh: 随机 sentinel 首次跨对象或跨请求出现后停止，不使用 isAdmin、命令参数或持久化配置验证。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the random sentinel first appears across objects or requests; do not validate with isAdmin, command arguments, or persistent configuration.

opsecTips.zh: 重启测试进程，删除请求 fixture 和对象快照，清除共享缓存并恢复特殊键拒绝及安全合并库。
opsecTips.en: Restart the test process, delete request fixtures and object snapshots, clear shared caches, and restore special-key rejection and a safe merge library.

name.zh: JSON 请求体原型链污染

description.zh: 验证 JSON 解析与深度合并逻辑是否接受特殊原型键，并让污染属性影响后续对象或授权判断。
description.en: Tests whether JSON parsing and deep-merge logic accepts special prototype keys and lets polluted properties affect later objects or authorization decisions.

overview.zh: 原始 JSON 集合针对 JavaScript 对象合并边界，不属于普通业务逻辑。测试应识别解析器、合并库、对象生命周期和可观察的无害哨兵属性，避免直接使用管理员字段作为唯一证据。
overview.en: The original JSON set targets JavaScript object-merge boundaries rather than ordinary business logic. Testing identifies the parser, merge library, object lifetime, and a harmless observable sentinel instead of relying only on administrative properties.

vulnerability.zh: 若不可信 JSON 的 __proto__、constructor 或 prototype 路径被递归复制到共享原型，后续新对象可能继承攻击者属性并改变配置或授权。仅请求对象自身含有同名字段不等于全局污染。
vulnerability.en: If untrusted JSON paths such as __proto__, constructor, or prototype are recursively copied into a shared prototype, later objects may inherit attacker properties and alter configuration or authorization. An own property on the request object is not global pollution.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离进程中建立新对象不含随机哨兵属性的基线；2. 逐项发送原始 JSON，但将敏感字段替换为无害哨兵；3. 在独立后续请求创建新对象并检查继承来源。仅当前请求回显、数据库持久字段或测试夹具预置值属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Establish that a fresh object lacks a random sentinel in an isolated process. 2. Send original JSON items one at a time with sensitive fields replaced by a harmless sentinel. 3. Create a new object in an independent request and inspect inheritance. Current-request reflection, persisted database fields, and fixture defaults are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用无原型对象或 Map 保存不可信键值；2. 拒绝 __proto__、prototype、constructor 等危险路径并避免递归合并用户对象；3. 升级受影响依赖，冻结关键原型并加入跨请求污染回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Store untrusted key-value data in null-prototype objects or Maps. 2. Reject dangerous paths such as __proto__, prototype, and constructor and avoid recursive user-object merges. 3. Upgrade affected dependencies, freeze critical prototypes, and add cross-request pollution tests.

title.zh: 定位 JSON 合并路径

description.zh: 确认请求体经过的解析器、校验器与深度合并函数，并记录对象生命周期。
description.en: Identify the parser, validator, and deep-merge function handling the body and record object lifetime.

description.zh: 逐项提交原始 JSON 结构，但使用随机无权限含义的哨兵值进行验证。
description.en: Submit original JSON structures one at a time with a random sentinel that has no privilege meaning.

description.zh: 在后续独立请求创建全新对象并检查属性所有权，确认是否来自共享原型。
description.en: Create a fresh object in a later independent request and inspect property ownership to confirm shared-prototype inheritance.

review.rationale: 原命令是 JSON 形式的原型链污染输入，应从业务逻辑改归原型链污染。

prerequisites.zh: 确认查询字符串 parser、括号/点路径选项和后续 merge 链，在可重启服务中记录每层解码后的键。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the query-string parser, bracket and dotted-path options, and subsequent merge chain, recording decoded keys at every layer in a restartable service.

prerequisites.zh: 使用唯一无害 sentinel 构造 `__proto__` 与 constructor 路径，配对普通键和编码顺序变体并检查全新对象。
prerequisites.en: Use a unique harmless sentinel through __proto__ and constructor paths, pairing ordinary keys and encoding-order variants while inspecting fresh objects.

analysis.zh: 阳性是查询参数经解析和合并后污染共享原型，使未接触该请求的新对象或后续请求继承 sentinel，并有 parser/merge trace 佐证。URL 中保留特殊文本、框架返回 400、当前 query 对象含自有属性、页面回显、只在一个请求局部可见或安全克隆丢弃该键均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is query parsing and merging polluting a shared prototype so a fresh object or later request that never received the input inherits the sentinel, corroborated by parser and merge traces. Special text remaining in the URL, HTTP 400, an own property on the current query object, reflection, request-local visibility, or safe cloning that drops the key is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: sentinel 首次出现在独立对象后停止，不尝试权限字段、模板选项或命令执行 sink。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the sentinel first appears on an independent object; do not try privilege fields, template options, or command-execution sinks.

opsecTips.zh: 重启服务以清空原型状态，删除 URL fixture 和 trace，刷新缓存并恢复 parser 深度限制与危险键过滤。
opsecTips.en: Restart the service to clear prototype state, delete URL fixtures and traces, refresh caches, and restore parser depth limits and dangerous-key filtering.

name.zh: URL 参数原型链污染

description.zh: 验证查询字符串解析器是否把括号或点号路径转换为危险原型键，并污染服务端共享对象。
description.en: Tests whether a query-string parser turns bracket or dotted paths into dangerous prototype keys and pollutes shared server-side objects.

overview.zh: 该集合覆盖 __proto__ 与 constructor 路径的多种 URL 编码形态，风险取决于查询解析器和后续合并方式。测试应保持业务参数不变，仅改变一条键路径并观察跨请求对象。
overview.en: This collection covers URL-encoded forms of __proto__ and constructor paths, with risk determined by query parsing and subsequent merges. Testing holds business parameters constant, changes one key path, and observes objects across requests.

vulnerability.zh: 当解析器允许攻击者构造嵌套危险键，且应用把结果递归合并到普通对象时，共享原型可能被修改并影响配置、模板或授权。查询参数显示在调试页并不能证明原型已变化。
vulnerability.en: When a parser permits nested dangerous keys and the application recursively merges the result into ordinary objects, shared prototypes may change and affect configuration, templates, or authorization. Seeing the query on a debug page does not prove prototype mutation.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录解析前后对象结构并确认新对象无哨兵；2. 逐项请求原始 URL 参数结构，将值替换为随机无害标记；3. 在另一请求中检查新对象及敏感分支。只有非自有属性跨请求出现才成立，参数回显和缓存响应是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record object structure before and after parsing and confirm fresh objects lack the sentinel. 2. Request original URL parameter structures one at a time with random harmless values. 3. Inspect a new object and sensitive branch in another request. Confirm only cross-request inherited properties; reflected parameters and cached responses are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 配置查询解析器拒绝原型相关键并关闭不必要的深层解析；2. 对允许参数使用严格 schema 和附加属性禁用；3. 避免把解析结果合并到全局配置，升级依赖并监控原型变更。
mitigation.en: 1. Configure query parsing to reject prototype-related keys and disable unnecessary deep parsing. 2. Use strict schemas with additional properties disabled. 3. Avoid merging parsed results into global configuration, upgrade dependencies, and monitor prototype mutation.

description.zh: 识别括号、点号和百分号编码如何转换为嵌套对象，以及结果被合并到何处。
description.en: Identify how bracket, dotted, and percent-encoded keys become nested objects and where results are merged.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 URL 参数结构注入随机哨兵，保持其余查询参数完全一致。
description.en: Use original URL parameter structures one at a time to inject a random sentinel while holding all other parameters constant.

description.zh: 在全新请求创建对象并检查属性描述符，排除当前对象自有字段和缓存。
description.en: Create an object in a fresh request and inspect property descriptors, excluding own fields and cache effects.

review.rationale: 原集合属于查询字符串解析导致的原型链污染，不应继续归入业务逻辑。

prerequisites.zh: 确认页面实际加载的 AngularJS 版本、模板编译边界和输入 sink，并记录 CSP、Trusted Types 与 sanitization。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the AngularJS version actually loaded, template compilation boundary, and input sink, recording CSP, Trusted Types, and sanitization.

prerequisites.zh: 在隔离浏览器中用只设置随机 DOM 属性的表达式替代 alert/cookie，准备未编译文本和安全插值对照。
prerequisites.en: Use an expression that only sets a random DOM attribute instead of alert or cookie in an isolated browser, with uncompiled-text and safe-interpolation controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求不可信输入进入 AngularJS 编译，表达式实际执行并设置唯一 DOM canary，浏览器 trace 可定位执行上下文。花括号原样显示、AngularJS 未加载、表达式解析报错、静态 HTML 包含代码、CSP 阻止执行、或 canary 由测试脚本预设都不是表达式 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires untrusted input to enter AngularJS compilation, execute as an expression, and set the unique DOM canary, with browser tracing identifying the execution context. Literal braces, AngularJS not loaded, parse errors, code in static HTML, CSP blocking execution, or a canary pre-set by the harness is not expression XSS.

opsecTips.zh: DOM canary 首次由表达式设置后停止，不读取 Cookie、发起网络请求或使用 constructor 执行系统相关代码。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the expression first sets the DOM canary; do not read cookies, issue network requests, or use constructor paths for system-related code.

opsecTips.zh: 删除注入内容和浏览器 profile，清理缓存/存储与 trace，并恢复上下文编码、模板隔离和 CSP。
opsecTips.en: Delete injected content and the browser profile, clear caches, storage, and traces, and restore contextual encoding, template isolation, and CSP.

name.zh: AngularJS 1.6+ 表达式注入

description.zh: 验证不可信输入是否进入 AngularJS 表达式上下文，并在沙箱移除后的版本中形成客户端脚本执行。
description.en: Tests whether untrusted input reaches an AngularJS expression context and executes client-side script in versions where the sandbox was removed.

overview.zh: 原集合是 AngularJS 模板表达式，不属于业务逻辑载荷。是否可利用取决于页面是否由 AngularJS 编译该节点、输入是否保持表达式语义以及 CSP 与 Trusted Types 等浏览器策略。
overview.en: The original set contains AngularJS template expressions rather than business-logic payloads. Exploitability depends on AngularJS compiling the node, expression syntax surviving, and browser controls such as CSP and Trusted Types.

vulnerability.zh: 当攻击者可控文本被插入 ng-bind-html、模板或动态编译路径，并被 AngularJS 当作表达式求值时，构造器访问等语法可能执行脚本。纯文本回显、服务端转义或未启动 AngularJS 的页面不成立。
vulnerability.en: When attacker-controlled text enters ng-bind-html, templates, or dynamic compilation and AngularJS evaluates it as an expression, constructor access may execute script. Plain-text reflection, server escaping, or a page without AngularJS bootstrap is not exploitable.

exploitation.zh: 1. 确认页面版本、模块启动点和输入对应的 DOM 上下文；2. 从原始集合选择只写入随机 DOM 标记的表达式，在隔离浏览器逐项提交；3. 记录执行堆栈、CSP 报告和 DOM 变化。字符串显示、编码实体或扩展脚本触发属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Confirm framework version, bootstrap point, and the input's DOM context. 2. Select an original expression that writes only a random DOM marker and submit items one at a time in an isolated browser. 3. Record execution stack, CSP reports, and DOM changes. Displayed strings, encoded entities, and extension scripts are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 停止动态编译不可信 HTML 和 AngularJS 表达式；2. 采用上下文输出编码与成熟净化器，并迁移出已停止维护的 AngularJS；3. 部署严格 CSP、Trusted Types 和表达式注入浏览器回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Stop dynamically compiling untrusted HTML and AngularJS expressions. 2. Apply context-aware output encoding and a mature sanitizer, and migrate away from unsupported AngularJS. 3. Deploy strict CSP, Trusted Types, and browser regression tests for expression injection.

title.zh: 确认 AngularJS 编译上下文

description.zh: 定位输入落点、模块启动范围和模板编译调用，确认内容会被表达式求值。
description.en: Locate the input sink, module bootstrap scope, and template compilation call to confirm expression evaluation.

title.zh: 触发无害 DOM 标记

description.zh: 使用原始表达式结构写入随机页面标记，不读取 Cookie 或调用外部网络。
description.en: Use an original expression structure to write a random page marker without reading cookies or making external requests.

description.zh: 采集调用栈、DOM 属性和 CSP 事件，排除文本回显与浏览器扩展注入。
description.en: Capture stack traces, DOM attributes, and CSP events while excluding text reflection and extension injection.

review.rationale: 原命令为 AngularJS 表达式执行载荷，应改归 XSS 并限定框架上下文。

prerequisites.zh: 使用只含合成字段的导出数据和隔离办公软件配置文件，记录 CSV 原始字节、分隔符、编码及应用版本。
prerequisites.en: Use export data containing only synthetic fields and an isolated office-application profile, recording raw CSV bytes, delimiter, encoding, and application version.

prerequisites.zh: 以无外部副作用的算术 canary 公式替代语料中的命令/DDE 内容，并配对前置单引号、普通文本和不同首字符。
prerequisites.en: Replace command and DDE content in the corpus with a side-effect-free arithmetic canary formula, pairing leading-apostrophe, plain-text, and alternate-prefix controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求用户字段在原始导出单元格以公式前缀保留，并被受控电子表格应用实际计算为预设 canary。服务器存储字符串、文本编辑器显示等号、办公软件弹窗后阻止、单元格被转义为文本、命令文本只出现在文件或宏功能被禁用都不是公式执行。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the user field to retain a formula prefix in the raw exported cell and the controlled spreadsheet application to calculate the preset canary. Server-side storage, an equals sign in a text editor, an office warning that blocks execution, a cell escaped as text, command text merely present in the file, or disabled macro features is not formula execution.

opsecTips.zh: 无副作用算术 canary 首次被计算后停止，不测试 DDE、命令、网络或文件读写公式。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the side-effect-free arithmetic canary is first calculated; do not test DDE, commands, network, or file-reading or writing formulas.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 CSV 与办公软件 profile，清除最近文件和缓存，并恢复单元格前缀转义与导出净化。
opsecTips.en: Delete the CSV and office profile, clear recent files and caches, and restore cell-prefix escaping and export sanitization.

name.zh: CSV 公式注入

description.zh: 验证导出到电子表格的用户字段是否以公式前缀开头，并在受控办公软件中被解释为公式。
description.en: Tests whether user-controlled fields exported to spreadsheets begin with formula prefixes and are interpreted as formulas by a controlled office application.

overview.zh: CSV 本身只是文本，风险发生在导出文件被桌面表格程序打开时。测试要记录输入字段、生成文件的原始单元格字节、目标软件版本与安全提示，不能把服务端存储成功直接当作执行。
overview.en: CSV is plain text; risk occurs when a desktop spreadsheet application opens the export. Testing records the input field, raw exported cell bytes, application version, and security prompts rather than treating server-side storage as execution.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用未经转义地把以 =、+、- 或 @ 开头的用户数据放入单元格，表格软件可能按公式处理并造成外联或本地命令风险。公式被显示为文本或被受保护视图阻止时，尚未形成执行证据。
vulnerability.en: If an application exports user data beginning with =, +, -, or @ without safe handling, spreadsheet software may interpret it as a formula and enable external requests or local-command risk. Display as text or blocking by protected view is not execution evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在测试记录中写入只引用本地固定单元格的无害公式并导出；2. 保留原始集合但禁用其中系统命令项，只在隔离办公软件逐项查看解析；3. 比较 CSV 字节、单元格类型和安全提示。预览页渲染或文本显示属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Put a harmless formula referencing a fixed local cell into a test record and export it. 2. Preserve the original set but disable system-command items, inspecting parsing one item at a time in an isolated office application. 3. Compare CSV bytes, cell type, and security prompts. Preview rendering or text display is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对导出字段执行电子表格专用转义，并把潜在公式值强制为文本；2. 使用能够声明单元格类型的格式与库，避免手工拼接 CSV；3. 对四类公式前缀、制表符和换行绕过建立导出回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Apply spreadsheet-specific escaping and force potential formulas to text. 2. Use formats and libraries that declare cell types instead of manually concatenating CSV. 3. Add export regression tests for formula prefixes, tabs, and newline bypasses.

title.zh: 追踪字段到导出单元格
title.en: Trace the field to an exported cell

description.zh: 确认用户字段如何经过存储、序列化和引用处理进入最终 CSV 单元格。
description.en: Trace the user field through storage, serialization, and quoting into the final CSV cell.

description.zh: 使用原始公式前缀结构生成只操作本地固定值的测试行，不启动系统命令。
description.en: Use original formula-prefix structures to create a test row that only handles a fixed local value and launches no commands.

description.zh: 记录办公软件版本、单元格类型和安全提示，确认是否真的按公式求值。
description.en: Record office application version, cell type, and security prompts to confirm actual formula evaluation.

review.rationale: 原集合是电子表格公式注入载荷，应从业务逻辑改归文件导出安全。

prerequisites.zh: 使用专用 OAuth 测试客户端、合成账户、精确登记回调和所有权明确的候选域/开放重定向端点。
prerequisites.en: Use a dedicated OAuth test client, synthetic account, exactly registered callback, and owned candidate domains or open-redirect endpoints.

prerequisites.zh: 在授权与兑换阶段关联 client_id、redirect_uri、state、一次性 code 和最终浏览器接收方，逐个改变规范化特征。
prerequisites.en: Correlate client_id, redirect_uri, state, one-time code, and final browser recipient across authorization and exchange, changing normalization features one at a time.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求未登记、解析歧义或开放重定向组合让受控外部接收方得到为测试客户端签发的 code/token，并证明凭据可在受影响绑定下兑换。外域仅收到无 code 请求、地址栏显示候选 URI、授权服务器错误页、code 被严格回调绑定而不可兑换、或导航停在登记域都不是可利用绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an unregistered, ambiguously parsed, or open-redirect-composed URI to deliver a code or token issued for the test client to the controlled external recipient, with the credential redeemable under the affected binding. An external request without a code, a candidate URI in the address bar, an authorization-server error page, a code strictly bound and unredeemable, or navigation ending at the registered domain is not an exploitable bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个一次性测试 code 首次离开登记回调后停止，不兑换真实用户凭据或扩展到其他客户端。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one one-time test code first leaves the registered callback; do not redeem real-user credentials or expand to other clients.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销 code/token 与会话，删除外部回调日志、页面和 DNS，清除浏览器数据并恢复精确 URI 匹配。
opsecTips.en: Revoke codes, tokens, and sessions, delete external callback logs, pages, and DNS, clear browser data, and restore exact URI matching.

name.zh: OAuth redirect_uri 校验绕过

description.zh: 验证授权服务器是否对回调地址执行预注册后的精确匹配，防止授权码或令牌被重定向到攻击者地址。
description.en: Tests whether an authorization server exactly matches redirect URIs against preregistered values so codes or tokens cannot be redirected to an attacker.

overview.zh: 该记录属于 OAuth 协议边界而非一般业务逻辑。原集合覆盖路径规范化、用户信息段、子域、编码和开放跳转组合，评估必须串联授权请求、浏览器跳转与最终接收端。
overview.en: This entry concerns an OAuth protocol boundary rather than general business logic. The original set covers path normalization, userinfo, subdomains, encoding, and open-redirect composition, so assessment follows the authorization request through the final receiver.

vulnerability.zh: 授权服务器若使用前缀、子串或不一致的规范化方式匹配 redirect_uri，攻击者可能让授权响应落到未注册地址并截获一次性凭据。仅跳转到合法客户端错误页，不代表授权码已泄露。
vulnerability.en: If an authorization server matches redirect_uri using prefixes, substrings, or inconsistent normalization, an authorization response may reach an unregistered location and expose one-time credentials. Reaching a legitimate client's error page does not prove code leakage.

exploitation.zh: 1. 为测试客户端记录唯一注册回调并建立正常授权基线；2. 逐项提交原始回调变体，使用两个隔离浏览器会话；3. 在最终接收端核对授权码、state、客户端和用户。只有凭据到达未注册接收端才成立，中间 302 或错误页是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record the sole registered callback for a test client and establish a normal authorization baseline. 2. Submit original callback variants one at a time using two isolated browser sessions. 3. Verify code, state, client, and user at the final receiver. Confirm only when credentials reach an unregistered receiver; intermediate redirects and error pages are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对每个客户端预注册完整 HTTPS 回调并执行严格字符串匹配；2. 禁止通配符、开放跳转和不受控子域作为回调；3. 强制 PKCE、一次性授权码、state 绑定和重放检测，并记录最终回调。
mitigation.en: 1. Preregister complete HTTPS callbacks per client and use exact string matching. 2. Disallow wildcards, open redirects, and uncontrolled subdomains as callbacks. 3. Enforce PKCE, one-time codes, state binding, replay detection, and final-redirect logging.

description.zh: 从授权服务器配置确认测试客户端唯一允许的回调地址与规范化规则。
description.en: Confirm the test client's sole allowed callback and normalization rules from authorization-server configuration.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 redirect_uri 变体发起授权，并为每次请求分配独立 state。
description.en: Initiate authorization with original redirect_uri variants one at a time and assign a distinct state to each request.

description.zh: 沿重定向链确认授权码或令牌最终到达的主机、路径与客户端身份。
description.en: Follow the redirect chain to identify the final host, path, and client identity receiving the code or token.

review.rationale: 原命令是 OAuth 回调地址规范化与匹配测试，应归入开放重定向和 OAuth 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 使用两个隔离浏览器会话与合成 OAuth 身份，记录每次授权启动的服务端 state、Cookie 和回调消费状态。
prerequisites.en: Use two isolated browser sessions and synthetic OAuth identities, recording server-side state, cookies, and callback consumption for each authorization start.

prerequisites.zh: 分别测试跨会话、缺失、已消费、错误以及脚本/URL 外观的 state，保持 code、client 和 redirect_uri 合法且固定。
prerequisites.en: Test cross-session, missing, consumed, wrong, and script- or URL-looking state values separately while keeping code, client, and redirect_uri valid and fixed.

analysis.zh: 阳性是错误或来自另一浏览器会话的 state 被接受，并让当前合成浏览器建立攻击者选择的登录身份或消费授权响应。state 值看似 URL/JavaScript、被页面回显、参数解析成功、回调返回 200、错误被记录但不建立会话或合法事务完成都不是 OAuth 登录 CSRF。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is an incorrect or another browser session's state being accepted and causing the current synthetic browser to establish an attacker-selected identity or consume the authorization response. A state value looking like a URL or JavaScript, reflection, parsed parameters, HTTP 200 on callback, a logged error without session creation, or completion of the legitimate transaction is not OAuth login CSRF.

opsecTips.zh: 跨会话 state 首次改变合成登录身份后停止，不继续账户绑定、资料修改或真实用户流程。
opsecTips.en: Stop after cross-session state first changes the synthetic logged-in identity; do not continue to account linking, profile changes, or real-user flows.

opsecTips.zh: 注销两个浏览器会话，撤销 code/token，清除 state 存储与回调日志，并恢复随机、绑定和单次消费。
opsecTips.en: Revoke both browser sessions and all codes or tokens, clear state storage and callback logs, and restore randomness, binding, and single consumption.

name.zh: OAuth state 会话绑定验证

description.zh: 验证 OAuth state 是否随机、一次性并绑定发起授权的浏览器会话，防止登录 CSRF 与响应注入。
description.en: Tests whether OAuth state is random, single-use, and bound to the initiating browser session to prevent login CSRF and response injection.

overview.zh: 原集合把 URL 和脚本字符串当作 state 值，但关键不是字符内容，而是服务端是否生成、保存并在回调时校验 state 与用户会话的对应关系。评估应使用两条隔离授权事务。
overview.en: The original set places URLs and script-like strings in state, but the security property is whether the server generates, stores, and validates state against the user's session. Assessment uses two isolated authorization transactions.

vulnerability.zh: 客户端若接受缺失、可预测、跨会话或可重放的 state，攻击者可把自己的授权响应注入受害者浏览器，造成账户错误绑定。state 被原样返回或含特殊字符本身不构成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: If a client accepts missing, predictable, cross-session, or replayed state, an attacker can inject an authorization response into a victim browser and cause incorrect account binding. Reflection or special characters in state are not vulnerabilities by themselves.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在浏览器 A 与 B 分别启动授权并记录各自 state、Cookie 与 PKCE；2. 逐项使用原始 state 变体交换、删除或重放回调；3. 核对最终登录账号与服务端事务。只有跨会话响应被接受才成立，错误页差异或回显是假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Start authorization in browsers A and B and record each state, cookie, and PKCE value. 2. Use original state variants to swap, remove, or replay callbacks one at a time. 3. Verify the final account and server transaction. Confirm only acceptance of a cross-session response; error-page differences and reflection are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用密码学随机、足够长度且一次性的 state；2. 将 state 与浏览器会话、客户端、回调和 PKCE 事务绑定；3. 在首次使用或超时后立即失效，并对缺失、交换和重放场景建立自动化测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use cryptographically random, sufficiently long, one-time state values. 2. Bind state to browser session, client, callback, and PKCE transaction. 3. Invalidate after first use or timeout and automate missing, swapped, and replayed-state tests.

description.zh: 在隔离浏览器中分别记录 state、会话 Cookie、PKCE 与预期登录账号。
description.en: Record state, session cookie, PKCE, and expected account in two isolated browsers.

description.zh: 逐项应用原始 state 变体修改回调，保持授权码和客户端参数可追踪。
description.en: Apply original state variants one at a time to modify callbacks while keeping code and client parameters traceable.

attackChain.payload:
state=evil.com
state=https://evil.com
state=//evil.com
state=javascript:alert(1)
state=data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>
state=[]
state={}

description.zh: 检查服务端授权事务与最终会话主体，确认是否接受了另一浏览器的响应。
description.en: Inspect the server authorization transaction and final session principal to determine whether another browser's response was accepted.

review.rationale: 原集合用于 state 参数负向测试，应归入 OAuth 登录 CSRF 而非业务逻辑。

prerequisites.zh: 先逐项区分运行时失败输入与正则源码样例，把前者路由到隔离计时测试、后者路由到静态分析工具。
prerequisites.en: First distinguish runtime failing inputs from regex source examples, routing the former to isolated timing tests and the latter to static-analysis tools.

prerequisites.zh: 为每个风险 pattern 确定语言/引擎和真实调用点，并用递增长度、匹配/失败对照及资源上限验证。
prerequisites.en: Identify language, engine, and real call site for every risky pattern, validating with increasing lengths, match and failure controls, and resource limits.

analysis.zh: 本条拆分阳性要求输入和源码样例各自进入正确目标：静态工具能定位嵌套量词/歧义分支，运行时则必须呈可重复超线性增长并关联到该 pattern。字符串较长、工具仅报警、pattern 作为请求被回显、一次超时或未在应用使用的危险正则都不能证明可利用 ReDoS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence for the split requires inputs and source examples to reach the correct targets: static tooling locates nested quantifiers or ambiguous branches, while runtime testing must show reproducible superlinear growth tied to that pattern. A long string, a tool warning alone, a pattern reflected as request text, one timeout, or a risky regex unused by the application does not prove exploitable ReDoS.

opsecTips.zh: 运行时曲线达到资源阈值或静态位置已确认后停止，不把两组内容拼成批量网络请求。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the runtime curve reaches the resource threshold or the static location is confirmed; do not combine both groups into bulk network requests.

opsecTips.zh: 终止测试 worker，删除 trace、输入集和静态扫描缓存，并保留仅含脱敏 pattern 路由的拆分记录。
opsecTips.en: Terminate test workers, delete traces, input sets, and static-scan caches, and retain only a redacted pattern-routing record.

name.zh: ReDoS 输入与高风险正则混合集
name.en: Mixed ReDoS Inputs and Risky Regex Patterns

description.zh: 同时包含近似失败输入和高风险正则模式，需拆分为运行时载荷与静态正则分析资料。
description.en: Contains both near-failing inputs and risky regex patterns and should be split into runtime payloads and static regex-analysis material.

overview.zh: 原集合前半是递增长度的失败匹配字符串，后半是嵌套量词和歧义分支模式。两类数据的使用方法不同：输入用于受控计时，模式用于源码或配置审查，不能作为同一种请求批量发送。
overview.en: The first portion contains increasing failed-match strings, while the latter contains nested-quantifier and ambiguous-alternation patterns. Inputs support controlled timing; patterns support source or configuration review and should not be sent as one request list.

vulnerability.zh: 当高风险表达式处理接近匹配但最终失败的输入时，回溯复杂度可能随长度超线性增长并耗尽线程或 CPU。字符串长、模式看起来复杂或单次请求超时，都不足以独立证明 ReDoS。
vulnerability.en: When a risky expression handles near-matching input that ultimately fails, backtracking complexity may grow superlinearly and exhaust threads or CPU. Long strings, complex-looking patterns, or one timeout do not independently prove ReDoS.

exploitation.zh: 1. 将原始集合按输入与模式分组，并定位实际使用的正则；2. 对输入组按长度递增计时，对模式组只做静态复杂度检查；3. 重复采样 CPU、线程和延迟斜率。冷启动、下游阻塞或把模式文本当输入导致的异常属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Separate the original set into inputs and patterns and locate the regex actually used. 2. Time the input group by increasing length and use the pattern group only for static complexity review. 3. Repeat CPU, thread, and latency-slope measurements. Cold starts, downstream blocking, and errors from sending pattern text as input are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 用线性时间表达式或专用解析器替换歧义模式；2. 限制输入长度、执行时间和并发；3. 在 CI 中对正则做静态检查，并用递增长度样本监控复杂度斜率与资源上限。
mitigation.en: 1. Replace ambiguous expressions with linear-time patterns or dedicated parsers. 2. Limit input length, execution time, and concurrency. 3. Statically analyze regexes in CI and monitor complexity slope and resource caps with increasing samples.

description.zh: 根据语法将原始行分成可发送字符串和仅用于静态审查的正则表达式。
description.en: Classify original lines into sendable strings and regex expressions used only for static review.

description.zh: 只对输入组逐项执行受控匹配，设置超时并记录每个长度的独立耗时。
description.en: Execute controlled matching only for the input group, with a timeout and isolated timing per length.
