description.zh: 将模式组导入正则分析工具，核对嵌套量词与重叠分支是否出现在生产路径。
description.en: Import the pattern group into a regex analyzer and verify whether nested quantifiers or overlapping alternatives occur in production paths.

review.rationale: 同一命令块混合运行时输入与正则源码样例，必须拆分后分别进入载荷和分析工具。

prerequisites.zh: 使用自有权威 DNS 域控制 TTL 与解析顺序，准备公网回调和隔离环回标记服务，记录每次解析/连接。
prerequisites.en: Use an owned authoritative DNS domain to control TTL and answer order, with a public callback and isolated loopback marker recording every resolution and connection.

prerequisites.zh: 确认应用在验证、重定向和连接阶段的解析器与缓存，限制出站网络只允许两个受控标记端点。
prerequisites.en: Identify resolvers and caches at validation, redirect, and connection stages, limiting egress to the two controlled marker endpoints.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求主机名在检查时解析为允许地址、连接时重新解析为受控内网/环回地址，并由服务端连接日志和标记请求证明未重新校验。DNS 答案改变、缓存命中、浏览器访问、仅收到 DNS 查询、连接仍到公网、解析失败或扫描器识别 nip.io 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the hostname to resolve to an allowed address during validation and to a controlled internal or loopback address at connection time, with server-side connection logs and marker requests proving no revalidation. A changed DNS answer, cache hit, browser access, DNS query alone, connection still reaching public IP, resolution failure, or a scanner recognizing nip.io is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 环回标记首次收到服务端连接后停止，不指向云元数据、真实内网服务或第三方重绑定域。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the loopback marker first receives the server connection; do not target cloud metadata, real internal services, or third-party rebinding domains.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 DNS 记录，关闭回调/环回服务，刷新解析与代理缓存，撤销临时出站规则并清理请求日志。
opsecTips.en: Delete DNS records, shut down callback and loopback services, flush resolver and proxy caches, revoke temporary egress rules, and clear request logs.

name.zh: DNS 重绑定主机名测试

description.zh: 使用可变解析主机名验证应用是否在首次解析后错误信任主机，并在后续连接时访问内网地址。
description.en: Uses hostnames with changing resolution to test whether an application trusts an initial lookup and later connects to an internal address.

subCategory.zh: DNS 重绑定与解析一致性

overview.zh: 原集合列出公共重绑定服务和编码 IP 主机名。评估重点是目标在校验、解析、重定向和实际连接之间是否重新解析，以及每次解析后的地址是否再次执行网络边界检查。
overview.en: The original set lists public rebinding services and encoded-IP hostnames. Assessment focuses on whether validation, resolution, redirects, and connection trigger new lookups and whether every resolved address is rechecked against network boundaries.

vulnerability.zh: 如果应用只校验第一次 DNS 结果或只比较主机名，攻击者可让后续解析指向环回或私网地址，绕过 SSRF 允许列表。仅 DNS 返回不同地址但目标未建立内网连接，不构成实际访问。
vulnerability.en: If an application validates only the first DNS result or compares only hostnames, later resolution can point to loopback or private addresses and bypass an SSRF allowlist. Different DNS answers without an internal connection do not establish access.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在自有权威 DNS 中配置可审计、低 TTL 的测试域并建立外部地址基线；2. 逐项使用原始主机名形态，在隔离网络让后续解析指向测试内网服务；3. 关联 DNS 查询和连接日志。浏览器 DNS、扫描器查询或未连接解析属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Configure an auditable low-TTL test domain in an owned authoritative DNS zone and establish an external-address baseline. 2. Use original hostname forms one at a time in an isolated network, directing later resolution to a test internal service. 3. Correlate DNS and connection logs. Browser DNS, scanner lookups, and unconnected resolutions are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在实际连接前解析并校验所有 A 与 AAAA 地址，阻断环回、私网和链路本地范围；2. 固定已批准目标或使用受控出口代理；3. 对重定向和每次重新解析重复校验，并防止 DNS 缓存投毒。
mitigation.en: 1. Resolve and validate every A and AAAA address immediately before connection, blocking loopback, private, and link-local ranges. 2. Pin approved destinations or use a controlled egress proxy. 3. Revalidate redirects and every re-resolution and protect DNS caches.

title.zh: 建立可控 DNS 区域

description.zh: 使用自有权威 DNS 记录每次查询，并配置外部与测试内网两个地址阶段。
description.en: Use an owned authoritative DNS service to log every query and configure external and test-internal address phases.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始主机名形式触发目标请求，保持协议、端口与路径不变。
description.en: Use original hostname forms one at a time to trigger target requests while holding scheme, port, and path constant.

description.zh: 对照 DNS 时间线与测试内网服务日志，确认实际连接使用了后续私网解析。
description.en: Compare the DNS timeline with test-internal service logs to confirm the actual connection used the later private resolution.

review.rationale: 主机名集合是 DNS 重绑定与 SSRF 地址校验测试载荷，应改归 SSRF。

prerequisites.zh: 在独立攻击站点和浏览器 profile 中使用合成登录账户，选择只切换无价值 canary 的敏感型按钮。
prerequisites.en: Use a separate attacker site and browser profile with a synthetic logged-in account, selecting a sensitive-shaped button that only toggles a valueless canary.

prerequisites.zh: 记录目标页 X-Frame-Options、CSP frame-ancestors、SameSite、嵌套祖先链和 iframe 实际渲染区域。
prerequisites.en: Record the target page's X-Frame-Options, CSP frame-ancestors, SameSite behavior, nested ancestor chain, and actual iframe render area.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求第三方页面成功嵌入已认证目标，透明覆盖将测试用户的一次明确点击落到预定 canary 控件并造成对应状态变化。iframe 标签存在、页面空白、浏览器控制台报阻止、只加载公开页、坐标不重合、脚本自动点击或用户看到并直接操作目标都不是点击劫持。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the third-party page to frame the authenticated target and transparently align one deliberate test-user click with the designated canary control, causing the corresponding state change. An iframe tag, blank page, browser blocking console error, public-page framing, misaligned coordinates, scripted clicks, or the user visibly operating the target is not clickjacking.

opsecTips.zh: canary 首次因对齐点击改变后停止，不对转账、删除、权限或真实账户控件进行覆盖。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the canary first changes from the aligned click; do not overlay transfer, deletion, privilege, or real-account controls.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚 canary，删除攻击页面和浏览器 profile，注销会话并恢复 frame-ancestors/XFO 与高风险操作确认。
opsecTips.en: Roll back the canary, delete the attacker page and browser profile, revoke the session, and restore frame-ancestors or XFO and confirmations for high-risk actions.

name.zh: 透明 iframe 点击劫持验证

description.zh: 使用透明覆盖 iframe 验证敏感页面能否被第三方站点嵌入，并诱导用户完成非预期操作。
description.en: Uses transparent overlay iframes to test whether a sensitive page can be embedded by a third-party site and induce unintended user actions.

overview.zh: 原集合包含不同定位、透明度和层级的 iframe 模板，属于点击劫持验证。风险由目标页面是否可被嵌入、敏感控件位置和操作确认机制共同决定，而不是仅凭 HTML 能加载。
overview.en: The original set contains iframe templates with different positioning, opacity, and stacking for clickjacking validation. Risk depends on framing, sensitive-control placement, and confirmation controls rather than HTML loading alone.

vulnerability.zh: 若敏感页面未通过 CSP frame-ancestors 或有效 X-Frame-Options 限制祖先，攻击者可把透明界面叠加到诱饵页面并劫持点击。页面可嵌入但没有可触发的敏感操作时，影响有限。
vulnerability.en: If a sensitive page lacks CSP frame-ancestors or effective X-Frame-Options restrictions, an attacker can overlay it transparently and hijack clicks. Frameability without an actionable sensitive control has limited impact.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在自有测试源加载目标的无副作用页面并记录控制台策略结果；2. 使用原始 iframe 样式对齐一个测试按钮，不提交真实交易；3. 通过浏览器截图、点击坐标和服务端审计确认事件命中内层页面。加载失败、同源测试或诱饵按钮响应属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Load a harmless target page from an owned test origin and record browser policy results. 2. Use original iframe styles to align a test button without submitting a real transaction. 3. Confirm the event reaches the framed page using screenshots, coordinates, and server audit data. Load failure, same-origin tests, and decoy-button responses are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 为所有敏感页面设置严格 CSP frame-ancestors，必要时兼容发送 X-Frame-Options；2. 对高风险操作要求重新认证和明确确认；3. 在真实浏览器中对跨源嵌入、嵌套 frame 与策略继承建立测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Set strict CSP frame-ancestors on every sensitive page and send X-Frame-Options where legacy support is needed. 2. Require reauthentication and explicit confirmation for high-risk actions. 3. Test cross-origin framing, nested frames, and policy inheritance in real browsers.

description.zh: 从自有测试源加载无副作用页面并记录 CSP、XFO 与控制台拦截结果。
description.en: Load a harmless page from an owned test origin and record CSP, XFO, and console enforcement results.

description.zh: 使用原始 iframe 样式把测试按钮与诱饵元素对齐，但不触发真实敏感操作。
description.en: Use original iframe styles to align a test button with a decoy element without triggering a real sensitive action.

attackChain.payload:
<iframe src="https://target.com" style="opacity:0;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:9999"></iframe>
<iframe src="https://target.com" style="opacity:0;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%"></iframe>
<iframe src="https://target.com" style="opacity:0.0001;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:9999"></iframe>
<iframe src="https://target.com" style="opacity:0.0001;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%"></iframe>
<iframe src="https://target.com" style="visibility:hidden;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:9999"></iframe>
<iframe src="https://target.com" style="visibility:hidden;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%"></iframe>

description.zh: 采集浏览器坐标、截图和服务端测试事件，确认点击落在被嵌入页面。
description.en: Capture coordinates, screenshots, and the server-side test event to confirm the click reached the framed page.

review.rationale: 原命令是透明 iframe 点击劫持模板，应归入点击劫持类别。

prerequisites.zh: 采集实际受保护页面最终响应中的所有 X-Frame-Options/CSP Header，包含 CDN、代理和重定向后的结果。
prerequisites.en: Collect all X-Frame-Options and CSP headers from the final protected-page response, including CDN, proxy, and post-redirect results.

prerequisites.zh: 在当前受支持浏览器中从同源与跨源测试页验证 framing，并记录重复 Header、ALLOW-FROM 和 CSP 优先级。
prerequisites.en: Validate framing from same-origin and cross-origin test pages in currently supported browsers, recording duplicate headers, ALLOW-FROM, and CSP precedence.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具发现是实际受保护页面因缺失、无效或冲突的 framing 策略而在目标浏览器中被不受信任源渲染；若评估影响，再结合无害 canary 控件。目录中含 ALLOW-FROM、把字符串作为请求发送、Header 出现在文档、旧浏览器理论差异或 iframe 被阻止都不是配置漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is an actual protected page being rendered by an untrusted origin in a target browser because framing policy is missing, invalid, or conflicting; impact can then be paired with a harmless canary control. ALLOW-FROM appearing in the catalog, sending a value as a request, a header string in documentation, theoretical legacy-browser differences, or a blocked iframe is not a configuration flaw.

opsecTips.zh: 一个受保护测试页在受支持浏览器中被跨源渲染后停止，不继续覆盖真实敏感控件。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one protected test page is cross-origin rendered in a supported browser; do not continue to overlay real sensitive controls.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 framing fixture 和浏览器 profile，清除 CDN/代理缓存与响应捕获，并恢复 CSP frame-ancestors 与一致 XFO。
opsecTips.en: Delete framing fixtures and browser profiles, clear CDN and proxy caches and response captures, and restore CSP frame-ancestors and consistent XFO.

name.zh: X-Frame-Options 策略值审查表

description.zh: 整理遗留 X-Frame-Options 值用于响应头配置审查；这些文本不是可发送到目标的攻击载荷。
description.en: Catalogs legacy X-Frame-Options values for response-header configuration review; the text is not an attack payload to send to a target.

overview.zh: 原集合几乎全部是 ALLOW-FROM 变体，这是已废弃且浏览器支持不一致的响应头指令。正确用途是检查服务器实际返回的策略，而不是把这些值作为请求参数批量测试。
overview.en: The original set consists mainly of ALLOW-FROM variants, a deprecated directive with inconsistent browser support. Its proper use is reviewing policies actually returned by the server, not sending the values as request parameters.

vulnerability.zh: 依赖无效、重复或被中间层覆盖的 X-Frame-Options 可能使页面在部分浏览器中仍可嵌入。然而配置文本出现在源码、文档或扫描报告中，不代表生产响应缺少有效保护。
vulnerability.en: Invalid, duplicated, or intermediary-overwritten X-Frame-Options may leave pages frameable in some browsers. Configuration text in source, documentation, or scanner output does not mean production responses lack effective protection.

exploitation.zh: 1. 将原始值导入安全响应头审查规则；2. 从多个敏感路由和响应状态采集实际头部，并在支持矩阵内解释；3. 用跨源 iframe 验证最终浏览器行为。仅匹配 ALLOW-FROM 字符串、代理缓存头或非敏感页面可嵌入属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Import the original values into a security-header review rule. 2. Collect actual headers from multiple sensitive routes and response states and interpret them against browser support. 3. Validate final behavior with a cross-origin iframe. Matching an ALLOW-FROM string, cached proxy headers, or a frameable nonsensitive page is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 以 CSP frame-ancestors 作为主要控制并按需补充 SAMEORIGIN 或 DENY；2. 在反向代理和应用层避免重复冲突头；3. 对登录、支付和管理页面持续运行跨源嵌入浏览器测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use CSP frame-ancestors as the primary control and add SAMEORIGIN or DENY when needed. 2. Avoid duplicate conflicting headers across proxies and applications. 3. Continuously test cross-origin framing on login, payment, and administration pages.

description.zh: 从敏感页面的成功、错误和重定向响应中记录最终 XFO 与 CSP 头部。
description.en: Record final XFO and CSP headers from successful, error, and redirect responses on sensitive pages.

description.zh: 把原始策略文本导入响应头审查工具，标记废弃、冲突与不受支持的值。
description.en: Import original policy text into a header-review tool and flag deprecated, conflicting, and unsupported values.

attackChain.payload:
ALLOW-FROM https://evil.com
ALLOW-FROM http://evil.com
ALLOW-FROM https://evil.com:443
ALLOW-FROM http://evil.com:80
ALLOW-FROM https://evil.com:8080
ALLOW-FROM http://evil.com:8443
ALLOW-FROM https://evil.com:8888
ALLOW-FROM http://evil.com:3000
ALLOW-FROM https://evil.com:5000
ALLOW-FROM http://evil.com:9000
ALLOW-FROM https://evil.com:9090

description.zh: 在跨源测试页嵌入目标并记录控制台与渲染结果，确认策略是否真正生效。
description.en: Frame the target from a cross-origin test page and record console and rendering results to confirm enforcement.

review.rationale: 记录是响应头策略字符串目录，不是请求载荷，应并入 HTTP 安全头审查工具。

prerequisites.zh: 获取实际页面的完整 CSP（包括 Report-Only、多个 Header、meta 与重定向），解析而不是拼接单个 directive 片段。
prerequisites.en: Obtain the actual page's complete CSP, including Report-Only, multiple headers, meta policies, and redirects, parsing rather than concatenating isolated directive fragments.

prerequisites.zh: 从受控允许源、不允许源和嵌套祖先链在真实浏览器中 framing，记录 console、CSP report 与渲染结果。
prerequisites.en: Frame the page from controlled allowed, disallowed, and nested ancestor chains in a real browser, recording console output, CSP reports, and rendering.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具发现是完整策略错误地允许攻击者可控祖先，或在嵌套链中漏检，使受保护测试页实际跨源渲染并产生对应 CSP 证据。策略文本含 evil.com、Report-Only 报告、directive 作为 URL 参数、公开页可嵌入、无凭证空页或浏览器正确阻止都不是可利用配置。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is the complete policy mistakenly allowing an attacker-controlled ancestor or missing one in a nested chain, causing the protected test page to render cross-origin with corresponding CSP evidence. evil.com text in a policy, a Report-Only report, a directive sent as a URL parameter, framing of a public page, an unauthenticated blank page, or correct browser blocking is not exploitable configuration.

opsecTips.zh: 首个不受信任祖先成功渲染受保护测试页后停止，不添加透明覆盖或真实操作。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first untrusted ancestor successfully renders the protected test page; do not add transparent overlays or real actions.

opsecTips.zh: 删除祖先链 fixture 和 CSP report，清除浏览器/CDN 缓存，并恢复精确 frame-ancestors 与监测配置。
opsecTips.en: Delete ancestor-chain fixtures and CSP reports, clear browser and CDN caches, and restore exact frame-ancestors and monitoring configuration.

name.zh: CSP frame-ancestors 策略审查表

description.zh: 整理 frame-ancestors 源表达式用于 CSP 配置审查，重点检查实际响应策略与浏览器祖先链匹配。
description.en: Catalogs frame-ancestors source expressions for CSP configuration review, focusing on actual response policy and browser ancestor-chain matching.

overview.zh: 原集合是 CSP 响应指令片段，其中部分值过宽或仅适合作为反例。它们不应作为 URL 参数发送；应与完整 Content-Security-Policy、多个祖先层级及报告模式结果一起审查。
overview.en: The original set contains CSP response-directive fragments, some intentionally broad or suitable only as counterexamples. They should not be sent as URL parameters and must be reviewed with the complete policy, nested ancestors, and reporting results.

vulnerability.zh: 若 frame-ancestors 缺失、语法无效、源表达式过宽或被重复策略误配置，敏感页面可能被非预期站点嵌入。仅在报告模式看到告警或在同源页面成功嵌入，不足以证明跨源绕过。
vulnerability.en: If frame-ancestors is absent, invalid, overly broad, or misconfigured across duplicate policies, a sensitive page may be framed by unintended sites. Report-only alerts or successful same-origin framing do not prove a cross-origin bypass.

exploitation.zh: 1. 抓取目标成功、错误与重定向响应的完整 CSP；2. 将原始片段导入策略审查器，检查语法、scheme、端口和通配符；3. 从允许与不允许的多层祖先页进行浏览器验证。报告模式、插件干预或缓存旧策略属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Capture complete CSP from successful, error, and redirect responses. 2. Import original fragments into a policy reviewer and inspect syntax, schemes, ports, and wildcards. 3. Validate from allowed and disallowed nested ancestor pages. Report-only mode, extension interference, and cached old policies are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对敏感页面使用最小化 frame-ancestors 允许列表或 'none'；2. 在所有状态码和边缘节点统一发送强制策略；3. 对通配符、scheme、端口、多层 frame 与 Report-Only 差异建立自动化浏览器测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use a minimal frame-ancestors allowlist or 'none' on sensitive pages. 2. Send an enforced policy consistently across status codes and edge nodes. 3. Automate browser tests for wildcards, schemes, ports, nested frames, and Report-Only differences.

title.zh: 汇总完整 CSP 策略

description.zh: 采集不同路由、状态码和边缘节点返回的全部 CSP 与报告模式头部。
description.en: Collect all enforced and report-only CSP headers across routes, status codes, and edge nodes.

description.zh: 使用原始 frame-ancestors 片段校验语法与匹配范围，不向业务接口发送。
description.en: Use original frame-ancestors fragments to validate syntax and match scope without sending them to business endpoints.

attackChain.payload:
frame-ancestors https://evil.com
frame-ancestors http://evil.com
frame-ancestors https://evil.com:443
frame-ancestors http://evil.com:80
frame-ancestors https://evil.com:8080
frame-ancestors http://evil.com:8443
frame-ancestors https://evil.com:8888
frame-ancestors http://evil.com:3000
frame-ancestors https://evil.com:5000
frame-ancestors http://evil.com:9000
frame-ancestors https://evil.com:9090
frame-ancestors *
frame-ancestors 'none'
frame-ancestors 'self'

description.zh: 从允许和拒绝的嵌套测试页面加载目标，记录浏览器实际执行与控制台报告。
description.en: Load the target from allowed and denied nested test pages and record actual browser enforcement and console reports.

review.rationale: 记录是 CSP 配置片段目录，应迁移到 HTTP 安全头工具而不是保留为独立攻击载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 定位应用脚本实际读取的全局或配置属性及后续 sink，在固定浏览器版本中记录注入前的类型和值。
prerequisites.en: Locate the global or configuration property actually read by application script and its downstream sink, recording pre-injection type and value in a pinned browser version.

prerequisites.zh: 使用唯一无网络 sentinel URL/字符串构造重复 id/name HTML，并配对唯一 ID、无 name 和显式 DOM 查询对照。
prerequisites.en: Build duplicate id and name HTML with a unique network-free sentinel URL or string, paired with unique-ID, no-name, and explicit DOM-query controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求命名属性规则把脚本预期的可信值替换为攻击者元素/集合，并让 sentinel 到达实际 URL、配置或控制流 canary。DOM 中存在重复 ID、window 上出现元素、HTML 被渲染、脚本读取后进行严格类型检查并拒绝、或值未进入任何 sink 都不是可利用 clobbering。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires named-property rules to replace a trusted value expected by script with an attacker element or collection and carry the sentinel into the real URL, configuration, or control-flow canary. Duplicate IDs in the DOM, an element appearing on window, rendered HTML, script rejecting the value after strict type checking, or no downstream sink is not exploitable clobbering.

opsecTips.zh: sentinel 首次到达无副作用 sink 后停止，不导航外部域、读取 Cookie 或调用敏感功能。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the sentinel first reaches a side-effect-free sink; do not navigate externally, read cookies, or invoke sensitive functionality.

opsecTips.zh: 删除注入 HTML 和浏览器 profile，清除 DOM/缓存 trace，并恢复显式查询、类型检查与可信配置初始化。
opsecTips.en: Delete injected HTML and the browser profile, clear DOM and cache traces, and restore explicit queries, type checks, and trusted configuration initialization.

name.zh: DOM Clobbering：重复 id/name
name.en: DOM Clobbering: Duplicate id and name

description.zh: 验证攻击者控制的 HTML 是否可通过重复 id/name 创建命名属性，覆盖脚本期望的 DOM 引用或配置对象。
description.en: Tests whether attacker-controlled HTML can use duplicate id/name attributes to create named properties and override DOM references or configuration objects expected by scripts.

overview.zh: 原集合利用浏览器命名属性访问规则，让元素通过 id 和 name 暴露为全局或集合属性。评估必须结合具体脚本读取点，确认应用是否把该属性当作字符串、URL 或受信配置。
overview.en: The original set uses browser named-property access rules so elements become global or collection properties through id and name. Assessment pairs each structure with a concrete script read and verifies whether the property is treated as a trusted string, URL, or configuration.

vulnerability.zh: 当应用把 window、document 或表单命名属性当作可信配置，且攻击者可注入相应元素时，DOM 引用可能被覆盖并改变导航、资源加载或安全判断。仅能创建重复元素但脚本不读取该名称时没有可利用影响。
vulnerability.en: When an application trusts named properties on window, document, or forms and an attacker can inject matching elements, DOM references may be clobbered and alter navigation, resource loading, or security checks. Duplicate elements without a script read have no exploitable impact.

exploitation.zh: 1. 定位读取目标名称的脚本并记录未注入时的属性类型；2. 逐项插入原始 id/name 结构，但指向自有无害 URL；3. 检查属性解析、调用栈和最终网络请求。静态 DOM 出现元素、开发者工具补全或未被脚本使用属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Locate the script reading the target name and record the baseline property type. 2. Insert original id/name structures one at a time, pointing only to an owned harmless URL. 3. Inspect property resolution, call stack, and final network request. Static element presence, developer-tool completion, or an unread property is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 不依赖全局命名属性读取配置，使用显式局部变量与可信 JSON；2. 净化不可信 HTML 并限制 id、name、form 和 URL 属性；3. 使用类型检查、对象冻结和 DOM Clobbering 回归测试保护关键读取点。
mitigation.en: 1. Do not read configuration through global named properties; use explicit local variables and trusted JSON. 2. Sanitize untrusted HTML and restrict id, name, form, and URL attributes. 3. Protect critical reads with type checks, object freezing, and DOM-clobbering regression tests.

description.zh: 从脚本中确认被读取的全局、表单或集合属性以及期望的数据类型。
description.en: Identify the global, form, or collection property read by script and its expected data type.

title.zh: 插入重复 id/name 结构

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 HTML 结构指向自有无害地址，并保持其他页面内容不变。
description.en: Use original HTML structures one at a time with an owned harmless destination while holding page content constant.

title.en: Confirm script consumption of the clobbered value

description.zh: 通过断点和调用栈证明业务脚本读取了命名元素，并产生可观察行为变化。
description.en: Use breakpoints and stack traces to prove application script read the named element and produced an observable behavior change.

review.rationale: 原命令是典型 DOM Clobbering HTML 结构，应归入 XSS/DOM 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 从源码确认应用自定义的 document 属性读取，区分浏览器只读内建属性，并固定浏览器及 DOM 解析模式。
prerequisites.en: Confirm application-defined document property reads from source, distinguish browser read-only built-ins, and pin browser and DOM parsing mode.

prerequisites.zh: 为每个候选名称记录属性描述符与解析前后值，使用无网络 sentinel 和不会形成命名属性的元素对照。
prerequisites.en: Record property descriptors and values before and after parsing each candidate name, using a network-free sentinel and an element that does not form a named property as control.

analysis.zh: 阳性是命名元素覆盖或创建了应用实际读取的 document 配置属性，并使 sentinel 改变一个固定 canary 分支或安全 URL sink。尝试覆盖 cookie/location 等只读内建但值未变、元素可由 document.getElementById 找到、属性只存在于集合、浏览器差异无实际脚本读取都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is a named element overriding or creating a document configuration property actually read by the application and causing the sentinel to change a fixed canary branch or safe URL sink. Attempts against read-only built-ins such as cookie or location with no value change, normal getElementById access, a property only in a collection, or browser differences without an application read are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 一个应用自定义属性首次驱动 canary 后停止，不测试浏览器安全内建或真实导航。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one application-defined property first drives the canary; do not test browser security built-ins or real navigation.

opsecTips.zh: 移除命名元素，删除浏览器 profile 和属性 trace，清空页面缓存，并恢复局部常量和显式 DOM 引用。
opsecTips.en: Remove named elements, delete browser profiles and property traces, clear page caches, and restore local constants and explicit DOM references.

name.zh: DOM Clobbering：document 属性覆盖

description.zh: 验证命名元素是否能干扰应用从 document 读取的属性或自定义配置，并导致 URL 或逻辑分支被替换。
description.en: Tests whether named elements can interfere with properties or custom configuration read from document and replace URLs or control-flow values.

overview.zh: 该集合枚举 cookie、domain、location、URL、referrer 等名称，但现代浏览器对内建只读属性的处理并不一致。测试必须先识别应用实际读取的自定义名称与浏览器行为，不能假设每个名称都可覆盖。
overview.en: The set enumerates names such as cookie, domain, location, URL, and referrer, but modern browsers handle built-in read-only properties differently. Testing first identifies names actually read by the application and browser behavior rather than assuming every property is clobberable.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用通过 document 的命名属性获取配置且未验证类型，攻击者注入的元素可能取代预期值并控制后续导航或资源地址。内建属性保持原值、元素只在集合中出现或没有后续危险使用时，不构成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: If an application retrieves configuration through document named properties without type validation, injected elements may replace expected values and control later navigation or resource URLs. Preserved built-ins, collection-only exposure, or no dangerous downstream use is not a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在目标浏览器记录 document 相关属性的描述符和应用读取堆栈；2. 逐项插入原始元素，所有 href 仅指向本地测试端点；3. 观察属性类型、分支和最终请求。浏览器版本差异、控制台求值副作用或静态元素存在属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record property descriptors and application read stacks for relevant document properties in the target browser. 2. Insert original elements one at a time with every href pointing to a local test endpoint. 3. Observe property type, branches, and final requests. Browser-version differences, console-evaluation effects, and static element presence are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 从模块私有配置对象读取值，不使用 document 命名属性作为信任边界；2. 对 HTML 输入应用严格净化并禁止危险 id/name；3. 在使用 URL 前执行类型与来源校验，并覆盖主流浏览器的回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Read values from module-private configuration rather than document named properties. 2. Apply strict HTML sanitization and block dangerous id/name values. 3. Validate type and origin before URL use and add regression tests across major browsers.

title.zh: 记录 document 属性描述符

description.zh: 在未注入页面采集目标属性的类型、所有权、可写性与脚本读取位置。
description.en: Capture type, ownership, writability, and script read location for target properties on a clean page.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 document 名称结构并指向本地测试地址，避免任何外部请求。
description.en: Use original document-name structures one at a time and point them to a local test address, avoiding external requests.

description.zh: 通过断点确认污染值是否进入导航、资源加载或安全判断，而非只存在于 DOM。
description.en: Use breakpoints to determine whether the clobbered value reaches navigation, resource loading, or security checks rather than merely existing in the DOM.

review.rationale: 原集合针对 document 命名属性覆盖，应归入 DOM Clobbering 类别并补充浏览器差异条件。

prerequisites.zh: 枚举应用定义而非浏览器内建的 window 全局变量，记录属性 descriptor、初始化时序和实际消费脚本。
prerequisites.en: Enumerate application-defined rather than browser-built-in window globals, recording property descriptors, initialization order, and consuming scripts.

prerequisites.zh: 使用带唯一 sentinel 的 id/name 元素，在隔离页面对比注入前、DOM 解析后和应用初始化后的类型和值。
prerequisites.en: Use id or name elements with a unique sentinel in an isolated page, comparing type and value before injection, after DOM parsing, and after application initialization.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求元素创建的 window 命名属性抢占应用预期全局，且消费脚本将其当作可信配置并触发无副作用 canary。`window`、`top` 等不可配置内建保持不变、全局仅在 console 可见、应用随后覆盖正确值、类型校验失败或没有消费路径都不是可利用污染。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an element-created window named property to preempt an application global and be consumed as trusted configuration, triggering a side-effect-free canary. Nonconfigurable built-ins such as window or top remaining unchanged, a global visible only in console, later correct initialization, failed type checks, or no consumer path is not exploitable pollution.

opsecTips.zh: 一个自定义全局首次被 clobber 并到达 canary 后停止，不测试认证、支付或外部脚本加载配置。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one custom global is first clobbered and reaches the canary; do not test authentication, payment, or external-script-loading configuration.

opsecTips.zh: 删除注入 DOM 和浏览器 profile，清理全局快照/缓存，并恢复模块作用域、显式初始化和类型断言。
opsecTips.en: Delete injected DOM and browser profiles, clear global snapshots and caches, and restore module scope, explicit initialization, and type assertions.

name.zh: DOM Clobbering：window 全局属性覆盖
name.en: DOM Clobbering: window Global Property Override

description.zh: 验证带 id/name 的元素是否创建 window 命名属性，并覆盖应用脚本依赖的全局配置或对象引用。
description.en: Tests whether elements with id/name create window named properties and override global configuration or object references used by application scripts.

overview.zh: 原集合覆盖 window、self、top、parent、navigator 等大量名称，但部分是不可配置内建属性。可靠测试要以应用自定义全局变量为主，并记录污染前后的类型与属性描述符。
overview.en: The original set includes window, self, top, parent, navigator, and many other names, but some are nonconfigurable built-ins. Reliable testing focuses on application-defined globals and records type and descriptor changes before and after injection.

vulnerability.zh: 当脚本在初始化前从 window 读取尚未定义的全局配置，浏览器命名属性可能让攻击者元素占据该名称，并把 href 或子属性送入危险接收点。无法覆盖内建属性或后续代码重新赋值时，不存在实际影响。
vulnerability.en: When script reads an undefined global configuration from window before initialization, browser named properties may let an attacker element occupy the name and feed href or child properties into a dangerous sink. Non-overridable built-ins or later reassignment prevent impact.

exploitation.zh: 1. 选择应用真实读取且初始未定义的全局名，记录脚本执行顺序；2. 逐项插入原始 window 结构并使用本地无害 URL；3. 通过断点确认值进入具体接收点并记录网络或 DOM 结果。仅 window 上可见元素而无脚本消费属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Select an application-read global that is initially undefined and record script order. 2. Insert original window structures one at a time using a local harmless URL. 3. Use breakpoints to confirm the value reaches a concrete sink and record network or DOM results. An element visible on window without script consumption is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在模块作用域显式初始化配置并避免隐式全局变量；2. 对所有动态 HTML 使用可靠净化器并限制命名属性；3. 对关键全局值做类型、来源和 URL 校验，配合 CSP 与 Trusted Types 限制危险接收点。
mitigation.en: 1. Explicitly initialize configuration in module scope and avoid implicit globals. 2. Sanitize all dynamic HTML and restrict named attributes. 3. Validate type, origin, and URLs for critical globals and constrain dangerous sinks with CSP and Trusted Types.

description.zh: 确认应用脚本在初始化前读取该名称，且浏览器未定义不可配置的内建属性。
description.en: Confirm application script reads the name before initialization and the browser has no nonconfigurable built-in.

title.zh: 创建 window 命名属性

description.zh: 逐项使用原始元素结构创建同名属性，并让地址指向本地无害资源。
description.en: Use original element structures one at a time to create the named property with a local harmless resource.

title.en: Trace the value into a sink

description.zh: 在脚本读取处断点并跟踪属性到导航或 DOM 操作，确认存在可观察影响。
description.en: Break at the script read and trace the property into navigation or DOM operations to confirm observable impact.

review.rationale: 原集合是 window 命名属性覆盖载荷，应归入 DOM Clobbering 而非业务逻辑。

prerequisites.zh: 限定到自有测试 API 的明确 base URL、路径和参数位置，配置低速率、认证主体和 SPA fallback 基线。
prerequisites.en: Scope an owned test API to an explicit base URL, path, and parameter location, configuring low rate, a test principal, and an SPA-fallback baseline.

prerequisites.zh: 将版本/操作词、格式名和归档扩展分组，每次只测试一个候选并记录状态、Content-Type、schema 与后端路由。
prerequisites.en: Group version and operation words, format names, and archive extensions, testing one candidate at a time while recording status, Content-Type, schema, and backend route.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具发现是候选对应真实 API 路由或参数，返回可解析且与随机路径/参数显著不同的结构，并由网关/路由日志确认；漏洞还需另行验证授权或敏感数据。HTTP 200 的 SPA 页面、统一 404、静态文档、关键字出现在响应、重定向、空文件或 WAF 差异都不是 API 漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is a candidate mapping to a real API route or parameter, returning a parseable structure distinct from random controls and confirmed by gateway or router logs; a vulnerability still requires separate authorization or sensitivity proof. An SPA page with HTTP 200, uniform 404, static documentation, a keyword in the response, redirect, empty file, or WAF differential is not an API flaw.

opsecTips.zh: 首次确认一个真实路由或参数后停止该分组，不批量遍历扩展名或调用写操作。
opsecTips.en: Stop that group after confirming one real route or parameter; do not enumerate extensions in bulk or invoke write operations.

opsecTips.zh: 删除发现 fixture 和捕获响应，清理网关速率/缓存与测试日志，并撤销临时 API 凭据。
opsecTips.en: Delete discovery fixtures and captured responses, clear gateway rate state, caches, and test logs, and revoke temporary API credentials.

name.zh: API 参数与格式关键词目录
name.en: API Parameter and Format Keyword Catalog

description.zh: 汇总 API 版本、操作、数据格式和归档扩展名关键词，适合作为发现工具字典而不是独立漏洞载荷。
description.en: Catalogs API version, operation, data-format, and archive-extension keywords for discovery tools rather than as a standalone vulnerability payload.

overview.zh: 原集合混合参数名、版本片段、GraphQL 操作词、文档格式和压缩扩展名，缺少具体请求位置。它的合理用途是经过作用域约束的内容发现与参数枚举，而不是声称存在 API 漏洞。
overview.en: The original set mixes parameter names, version fragments, GraphQL operation terms, document formats, and archive extensions without a request location. Its proper use is scoped content discovery and parameter enumeration, not proof of an API vulnerability.

vulnerability.zh: 关键词本身没有漏洞属性；只有发现的端点或参数缺少认证、授权、输入验证或敏感数据保护时才形成问题。返回 200 的统一页面、前端路由回退和静态文档都可能造成假阳性。
vulnerability.en: Keywords are not vulnerabilities; a finding exists only when a discovered endpoint or parameter lacks authentication, authorization, validation, or data protection. Generic 200 pages, client-route fallbacks, and static documentation commonly create false positives.

exploitation.zh: 1. 将原始词条按参数、路径和扩展名拆分并导入发现工具；2. 仅对授权基础 URL 低速请求，记录状态、类型、长度和重定向；3. 对候选端点使用正常与未授权身份复核。统一响应、WAF 模板和静态资源不应算作 API 暴露证据。
exploitation.en: 1. Split original terms into parameter, path, and extension lists and import them into a discovery tool. 2. Request only authorized base URLs slowly, recording status, type, length, and redirects. 3. Recheck candidate endpoints with normal and unauthorized identities. Generic responses, WAF templates, and static assets are not API exposure evidence.

mitigation.zh: 1. 从生产部署移除未使用的端点、调试路由和构建产物；2. 对所有 API 版本执行一致的认证授权与 schema 校验；3. 维护接口清单、弃用流程和内容发现回归扫描，并对异常枚举限速。
mitigation.en: 1. Remove unused endpoints, debug routes, and build artifacts from production. 2. Apply consistent authentication, authorization, and schema validation to every API version. 3. Maintain an inventory and retirement process, run discovery regression scans, and rate-limit enumeration.

description.zh: 将原始行拆分为路径、参数、操作和文件扩展名列表，避免混合请求。
description.en: Separate original lines into path, parameter, operation, and file-extension lists to avoid mixed requests.

title.en: Import into a scoped discovery tool

description.zh: 把原始目录加载到已配置授权基础 URL 和速率上限的枚举工具中。
description.en: Load the original catalog into an enumeration tool configured with an authorized base URL and rate cap.

description.zh: 比较匿名与正常身份的结构化响应，排除统一页面、静态资源和重定向。
description.en: Compare structured responses for anonymous and normal identities, excluding generic pages, static assets, and redirects.

review.rationale: 原内容是多用途关键词和扩展名字典，没有请求上下文，应并入 API 内容发现工具。

prerequisites.zh: 签发短时效、单次使用的合成重置 token 并放入测试重置页 URL，控制所有第三方资源和导航接收端。
prerequisites.en: Issue a short-lived, single-use synthetic reset token in a test reset-page URL, controlling every third-party resource and navigation recipient.

prerequisites.zh: 在真实浏览器中固定 Referrer-Policy，记录接收端原始 Referer、token 完整性和 reset canary 可用性。
prerequisites.en: Pin Referrer-Policy in a real browser and record the recipient's raw Referer, token completeness, and reset-canary usability.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求不受信任接收端实际获得完整合成重置 token，并能在有效期内进入对应账户的无副作用 reset canary。语料中的 Referer 只指向 evil 路径但没有 token、浏览器只发送 origin、日志脱敏、token 无效/已用、同源资源接收或仅地址栏含 token 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an untrusted recipient to obtain the complete synthetic reset token and reach the corresponding account's side-effect-free reset canary within its lifetime. Corpus Referer values pointing to an evil path without a token, origin-only browser referrers, redacted logs, invalid or consumed tokens, same-origin recipients, or a token only in the address bar are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 一个受控接收端首次获得可用 token 后停止，不提交密码变更或转发给其他域。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one controlled recipient first obtains the usable token; do not submit a password change or forward it to another domain.

opsecTips.zh: 立即撤销 token，删除接收日志、页面与浏览器历史/缓存，并恢复严格 Referrer-Policy 和 URL token 禁止。
opsecTips.en: Immediately revoke the token, delete recipient logs and pages and browser history or caches, and restore a strict Referrer-Policy and prohibition on URL tokens.

name.zh: 密码重置令牌 Referer 泄露
name.en: Password Reset Token Leakage through Referer

description.zh: 验证重置页面中的令牌是否因外部资源或跳转进入 Referer，从而泄露到第三方服务日志。
description.en: Tests whether a token in a password-reset page leaks through Referer to third-party resource or navigation logs.

overview.zh: 原集合是 Referer 请求头样例，目标是检查密码重置令牌在 URL 中时是否随外部导航或资源请求泄露。评估必须使用测试令牌、自有接收端和真实浏览器 Referrer-Policy 行为。
overview.en: The original set contains Referer header examples for checking whether a reset token in a URL leaks during external navigation or resource loading. Assessment uses a test token, an owned receiver, and real-browser Referrer-Policy behavior.

vulnerability.zh: 如果重置令牌位于 URL 查询或路径中，且页面加载第三方资源或允许外跳而未设置严格 Referrer-Policy，完整 URL 可能进入第三方日志。手工伪造 Referer 被服务器接收并不能证明浏览器会泄露令牌。
vulnerability.en: If a reset token appears in a URL path or query and the page loads third-party resources or permits navigation without a strict Referrer-Policy, the full URL may reach third-party logs. A server accepting a forged Referer does not prove browser leakage.

exploitation.zh: 1. 签发一次性测试重置令牌并在隔离浏览器打开重置页；2. 使用原始外部目标形态触发自有接收端的无害图片或链接请求；3. 检查接收端 Referer、浏览器网络记录和令牌状态。仅代理注入头、手工请求或不含令牌的源信息属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Issue a one-time test reset token and open the reset page in an isolated browser. 2. Use original external-target forms to trigger a harmless image or link request to an owned receiver. 3. Inspect receiver Referer, browser network records, and token state. Proxy-injected headers, manual requests, and origins without a token are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用短期、一次性、高熵且与用户和用途绑定的重置令牌；2. 在重置页面设置 Referrer-Policy: no-referrer 并禁止第三方资源；3. 成功使用后立即失效令牌，避免将敏感值放入可传播的 URL。
mitigation.en: 1. Use short-lived, one-time, high-entropy reset tokens bound to user and purpose. 2. Set Referrer-Policy: no-referrer on reset pages and prohibit third-party resources. 3. Invalidate tokens immediately after use and keep sensitive values out of propagating URLs.

description.zh: 为隔离账号生成一次性令牌，记录有效期、用途和服务端事务标识。
description.en: Generate a one-time token for an isolated account and record expiry, purpose, and server transaction identifier.

description.zh: 使用原始 Referer 目标形态让真实浏览器访问自有接收端，不连接第三方。
description.en: Use original Referer target forms to make a real browser contact an owned receiver without involving third parties.

title.en: Verify receiver logs and token state

description.zh: 检查接收端是否获得完整令牌，并确认该值仍能对应有效重置事务。
description.en: Check whether the receiver obtained the complete token and whether it still maps to a valid reset transaction.

review.rationale: 原请求头样例可用于密码重置页 Referer 泄露验证，应归入认证漏洞。

prerequisites.zh: 为多个合成账户通过隔离通知通道签发重置 token，记录生成、绑定、过期、消费和在线尝试限制。
prerequisites.en: Issue reset tokens for multiple synthetic accounts through an isolated notification channel, recording generation, binding, expiry, consumption, and online attempt limits.

prerequisites.zh: 将短数字、常见词、空值和类型边界分别测试，使用随机基线与无密码变更 canary，避免混合解析和熵结论。
prerequisites.en: Test short numbers, common words, empty values, and type boundaries separately, using a random baseline and no-password-change canary to avoid mixing parser and entropy conclusions.

analysis.zh: 阳性是未见弱候选显著优于随机地预测有效 token，或空值/类型混淆映射到合成重置事务，并进入正确账户 canary；跨账户、过期或已消费后仍可用也成立。值短/常见、一次 fixture 猜中、错误信息不同、缺少限速、解析报错或 token 被拒绝均不证明弱 token。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is an unseen weak candidate predicting a valid token significantly better than random, or an empty or type-confused value mapping to a synthetic reset transaction and reaching the correct account canary; cross-account, expired, or post-consumption use also qualifies. A short or common value, one fixture guess, different errors, absent rate limiting, parse errors, or token rejection does not prove a weak token.

opsecTips.zh: 一个预测或边界值首次进入 reset canary 后停止，不提交新密码或扩大在线尝试。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one predicted or boundary value first reaches the reset canary; do not submit a new password or increase online attempts.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销所有重置 token，清空通知队列和样本，删除合成账户并恢复 CSPRNG、严格类型、绑定和单次使用。
opsecTips.en: Revoke all reset tokens, clear notification queues and samples, delete synthetic accounts, and restore CSPRNG generation, strict typing, binding, and single use.

name.zh: 弱密码重置令牌验证

description.zh: 使用低熵和边界令牌候选检查重置流程是否生成不可预测、一次性且与账号绑定的凭据。
description.en: Uses low-entropy and boundary token candidates to test whether password-reset credentials are unpredictable, single-use, and account-bound.

overview.zh: 原集合包含短数字、常见单词、空值和类型边界，适用于测试令牌验证器的熵与解析一致性。评估必须在隔离账号上进行，并区分无效参数、缺失参数和真实有效事务。
overview.en: The original set includes short numbers, common words, empty values, and type boundaries for testing token entropy and parser consistency. Assessment uses isolated accounts and distinguishes invalid, missing, and genuinely valid reset transactions.

vulnerability.zh: 如果重置令牌来源可预测、空间过小、未绑定用户或验证接口允许高频尝试，攻击者可能枚举有效事务并重置他人密码。错误文案差异、参数被解析或返回重置表单都不是成功证据。
vulnerability.en: If reset tokens are predictable, drawn from a small space, not user-bound, or accepted at high request rates, valid transactions may be enumerated and another user's password reset. Different errors, parsed parameters, or a displayed reset form are not success evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 为两个测试账号生成有效与过期令牌并记录服务端事务；2. 低速逐项提交原始候选，保持账号和客户端状态可追踪；3. 仅通过完成无害密码变更或服务端事务绑定确认结果。统一响应、验证码页面和新建匿名事务属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Generate valid and expired tokens for two test accounts and record server transactions. 2. Submit original candidates slowly while keeping account and client state traceable. 3. Confirm only through a harmless password change or server-side transaction binding. Generic responses, challenge pages, and newly created anonymous transactions are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用密码学安全随机源生成至少 128 位有效熵的令牌；2. 绑定账号、用途和短有效期，首次使用后原子失效；3. 对验证接口限速并返回统一响应，记录枚举模式和跨账号尝试。
mitigation.en: 1. Generate tokens with at least 128 bits of effective entropy from a cryptographically secure source. 2. Bind account, purpose, and short lifetime and invalidate atomically on first use. 3. Rate-limit validation, return uniform responses, and log enumeration and cross-account attempts.

description.zh: 为两个隔离账号分别生成有效、已用和过期令牌，并记录事务所有者。
description.en: Generate valid, used, and expired tokens for two isolated accounts and record transaction ownership.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 token 值请求验证接口，保持账号参数与客户端环境一致。
description.en: Request the validation endpoint with original token values one at a time while holding account parameters and client context constant.

attackChain.payload:
token=123
token=1234
token=12345
token=123456
token=1234567
token=123456789
token=admin
token=root
token=test
token=guest
token=user
token=default
token=secret
token=password
token=token
token=null
token=undefined
token=false
token=true
token=-1
token=[]
token={}
token=""

description.zh: 从服务端记录核对命中的令牌、账号与用途，避免依据页面文案做结论。
description.en: Verify token, account, and purpose in server-side records rather than drawing conclusions from page text.

review.rationale: 原集合是密码重置令牌边界与弱值候选，应归入认证漏洞并保留为载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 限定到自有 Web 根并建立随机不存在路径、SPA fallback 和公开文档样例基线，以低速逐个检查候选。
prerequisites.en: Scope an owned web root and establish random-nonexistent, SPA-fallback, and public-document baselines, checking candidates individually at low rate.

prerequisites.zh: 准备解析器识别 package/lock/npmrc 格式，并定义依赖版本、脚本、私有 registry 和 token 的脱敏规则。
prerequisites.en: Prepare parsers for package, lock, and npmrc formats and define redaction rules for dependency versions, scripts, private registries, and tokens.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求目标路径返回真实、可解析的 Node.js manifest/配置字节且来自部署环境；敏感影响需存在内部依赖、脚本、私有 registry 或凭据。HTTP 200 的 SPA fallback、目录重定向、空响应、公开示例、HTML 错误页、文件名出现在索引或正常公开客户端 package.json 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target path to return authentic, parseable Node.js manifest or configuration bytes from the deployed environment; sensitive impact additionally requires internal dependencies, scripts, private registries, or credentials. An SPA fallback with HTTP 200, directory redirect, empty response, public sample, HTML error page, filename in an index, or intentionally public client package.json is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 首次确认一个真实 manifest 后停止，不递归请求 node_modules 或下载完整项目树。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one authentic manifest; do not recursively request node_modules or download the project tree.

opsecTips.zh: 删除响应副本和解析缓存，清理访问日志中的测试令牌，撤销临时凭据并从 Web 根移除暴露文件。
opsecTips.en: Delete response copies and parser caches, clear test tokens from access logs, revoke temporary credentials, and remove exposed files from the web root.

name.zh: Node.js 依赖与包管理文件探测
name.en: Node.js Dependency and Package-Manager File Discovery

description.zh: 检查 package.json、锁文件和包管理配置是否被 Web 根目录意外公开并泄露依赖或私有仓库信息。
description.en: Checks whether package.json, lockfiles, and package-manager configuration are accidentally exposed under the web root and reveal dependencies or private registries.

overview.zh: 原集合是 Node.js 项目清单和包管理路径字典，合理用途是低速内容发现。风险取决于文件是否真实可读以及其中是否包含依赖版本、脚本、令牌占位或私有 registry 信息。
overview.en: The original set is a Node.js project-manifest and package-manager path wordlist for low-rate content discovery. Risk depends on actual readability and disclosure of dependency versions, scripts, token material, or private registry information.

vulnerability.zh: 若构建产物错误包含 package.json、锁文件或 .npmrc，攻击者可获取精确依赖图、内部包名或凭证配置，扩大供应链与已知漏洞攻击面。只返回前端路由 HTML 或空目录页不构成文件泄露。
vulnerability.en: If deployment artifacts expose package.json, lockfiles, or .npmrc, an attacker may learn exact dependency graphs, internal package names, or credential configuration and expand supply-chain risk. A client-route HTML fallback or empty directory page is not disclosure.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录不存在随机路径的状态、类型、长度和哈希基线；2. 逐项请求原始文件名，使用 HEAD 后再对小文件执行 GET；3. 验证响应是否能被相应包管理器解析并检查敏感字段。统一 200、错误模板或公开示例文件属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record status, type, length, and hash for a random nonexistent path. 2. Request original filenames one at a time, using HEAD before GET for small files. 3. Verify that responses parse as the expected package format and inspect sensitive fields. Generic 200 pages, error templates, and public example files are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 仅部署编译后的必要静态产物并从 Web 根排除清单、锁文件和配置；2. 在 CI 中扫描发布包与镜像层；3. 将仓库令牌放入密钥存储并轮换任何曾暴露的凭证。
mitigation.en: 1. Deploy only required built assets and exclude manifests, lockfiles, and configuration from the web root. 2. Scan release bundles and image layers in CI. 3. Store registry tokens in a secret manager and rotate any exposed credentials.

description.zh: 请求随机不可存在路径，记录路由回退页面的状态、类型、长度与正文哈希。
description.en: Request a random nonexistent path and record the fallback page's status, type, length, and body hash.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始文件名访问授权站点，先检查响应头再读取小型文本文件。
description.en: Use original filenames one at a time against the authorized site, checking headers before reading small text files.

attackChain.payload:
package.json
package-lock.json
yarn.lock
.npmrc
.yarnrc
node_modules
.npm
.yarn

description.zh: 解析 JSON 或锁文件结构并确认依赖字段，排除统一 HTML 和示例资源。
description.en: Parse JSON or lockfile structure and verify dependency fields, excluding generic HTML and sample resources.

review.rationale: 文件名列表可用于授权内容发现，应改归信息收集并保留为路径载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 在自有测试站点以固定 base path 和低速率请求候选，记录 SPA fallback、反向代理错误和静态资源规则。
prerequisites.en: Request candidates at a fixed base path and low rate on an owned test site, recording SPA fallbacks, reverse-proxy errors, and static-resource rules.

prerequisites.zh: 使用对应解析器验证 requirements、Pipfile、Poetry、Conda 和 setup 格式，并预设私有索引/本地路径脱敏。
prerequisites.en: Validate requirements, Pipfile, Poetry, Conda, and setup formats with appropriate parsers, predefining redaction for private indexes and local paths.

analysis.zh: 阳性是服务器公开返回可解析且与部署环境一致的 Python 依赖/环境清单；影响证据是精确版本、私有索引、editable 路径或内部包等非预期信息。文件名命中、统一 200 页面、文档示例、空文件、下载提示无正文、robots 条目或公开开源仓库镜像均不是部署泄露。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the server publicly returning a parseable Python dependency or environment manifest consistent with the deployment; impact evidence is unintended exact versions, private indexes, editable paths, or internal packages. A filename hit, uniform HTTP 200 page, documentation sample, empty file, download prompt without body, robots entry, or public open-source mirror is not deployment exposure.

opsecTips.zh: 一个真实依赖文件被确认后停止，不继续探测虚拟环境、源码目录或私有索引。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one authentic dependency file; do not continue to virtual environments, source directories, or private indexes.

opsecTips.zh: 删除下载与解析结果，清理缓存/访问日志并撤销暴露的测试索引 token，再收紧静态文件白名单。
opsecTips.en: Delete downloads and parse results, clear caches and access logs, revoke exposed test-index tokens, and tighten the static-file allowlist.

name.zh: Python 依赖与环境文件探测
name.en: Python Dependency and Environment File Discovery

description.zh: 检查 requirements、Pipfile、pyproject 与环境清单是否被公开，从而泄露 Python 依赖和部署信息。
description.en: Checks whether requirements, Pipfile, pyproject, and environment manifests are public and disclose Python dependencies or deployment details.

overview.zh: 原集合覆盖 pip、Poetry、Pipenv、Conda 和传统 setup 文件。验证重点是响应内容是否符合对应语法，以及依赖版本、私有索引 URL、可编辑安装路径或环境变量引用是否敏感。
overview.en: The original set covers pip, Poetry, Pipenv, Conda, and traditional setup files. Validation focuses on format authenticity and whether dependency versions, private index URLs, editable paths, or environment references are sensitive.

vulnerability.zh: 公开 Python 依赖清单可暴露精确版本、内部包、开发路径和私有源配置，为组件漏洞与依赖混淆提供信息。仅文件名匹配、搜索引擎缓存或返回应用首页时，不应报告真实文件暴露。
vulnerability.en: Public Python manifests can reveal exact versions, internal packages, development paths, and private indexes, informing component exploitation or dependency confusion. Filename matches, search caches, and application-homepage responses do not prove file exposure.

exploitation.zh: 1. 为目标记录随机路径和常见错误页指纹；2. 逐项请求原始 Python 清单名称并限制下载大小；3. 使用对应解析规则检查节标题、依赖约束和锁文件结构。响应是 HTML、网关错误或无关文本时判为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record a random-path and common error-page fingerprint for the target. 2. Request original Python manifest names one at a time with a download-size cap. 3. Check section headers, dependency constraints, and lock structures using format-specific rules. HTML, gateway errors, and unrelated text are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 通过构建阶段只复制运行所需产物，不把源码根目录作为静态目录；2. 从发布包排除依赖清单与开发配置，必要公开时移除私有源；3. 使用 SBOM 和内部资产清单替代生产文件暴露。
mitigation.en: 1. Copy only runtime artifacts during builds and never serve the source root as static content. 2. Exclude manifests and development configuration from releases, removing private indexes when publication is necessary. 3. Use SBOMs and internal inventories instead of production exposure.

description.zh: 采集随机路径、目录路径和不存在扩展名的响应，建立误报对照。
description.en: Collect responses for random paths, directories, and nonexistent extensions to establish false-positive controls.

description.zh: 逐项请求原始 requirements、Pipfile、Poetry 与 Conda 文件名并限制大小。
description.en: Request original requirements, Pipfile, Poetry, and Conda filenames one at a time with a size cap.

attackChain.payload:
requirements.txt
requirements.in
Pipfile
Pipfile.lock
setup.py
setup.cfg
pyproject.toml
poetry.lock
conda.yaml
environment.yml

description.zh: 检查依赖约束、区段和锁文件键，确认响应不是 HTML 回退或无关文本。
description.en: Check dependency constraints, sections, and lockfile keys to confirm the response is not HTML fallback or unrelated text.

review.rationale: 原命令是 Python 依赖文件路径字典，应归入信息收集。

prerequisites.zh: 在授权 Web 根按固定路径低速检查 Composer 候选，并建立 PHP 正常执行空响应、404 和 SPA fallback 对照。
prerequisites.en: Check Composer candidates at fixed paths and low rate on an authorized web root, establishing controls for normally executed empty PHP responses, HTTP 404, and SPA fallback.

prerequisites.zh: 使用 JSON/lockfile 解析和 PHP 源码特征确认真实性，预先定义包版本、内部仓库、绝对路径与 token 脱敏。
prerequisites.en: Confirm authenticity with JSON or lockfile parsing and PHP source signatures, predefining redaction for package versions, internal repositories, absolute paths, and tokens.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 composer.json/lock 以可解析原文公开，或 autoload.php 源码而非执行结果被返回，并包含部署相关信息。autoload.php 正常执行后的空白、统一 200 错误页、下载重定向、公开开源 manifest、文件名回显、解析失败或只有通用 Composer 文本都不是文件泄露。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires composer.json or composer.lock to be publicly returned as parseable source, or autoload.php source rather than execution output to be disclosed, with deployment-related information. Blank output from normal autoload.php execution, a uniform HTTP 200 error page, download redirect, public open-source manifest, reflected filename, parse failure, or generic Composer text is not file exposure.

opsecTips.zh: 首次确认一个真实 Composer 文件后停止，不追踪 vendor 路径或请求其他 PHP 源码。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one authentic Composer file; do not follow vendor paths or request additional PHP source.

opsecTips.zh: 删除响应和解析缓存，清理访问日志，撤销泄露的测试仓库凭据，并从 Web 根移除 manifest/源码。
opsecTips.en: Delete responses and parser caches, clear access logs, revoke exposed test-repository credentials, and remove manifests or source from the web root.

name.zh: PHP Composer 清单与自动加载文件探测
name.en: PHP Composer Manifest and Autoloader Discovery

description.zh: 检查 composer.json、composer.lock 或 autoload.php 是否被公开并泄露 PHP 包、路径或自动加载结构。
description.en: Checks whether composer.json, composer.lock, or autoload.php is public and discloses PHP packages, paths, or autoload structure.

overview.zh: 该集合很小但涵盖 Composer 项目清单、锁文件与自动加载入口。清单可用于识别依赖，autoload.php 若被当作文本泄露则还可能暴露服务器路径；若正常执行为空响应则不能据此判定泄露。
overview.en: This compact set covers Composer manifests, lockfiles, and the autoloader entry point. Manifests identify dependencies, while source disclosure of autoload.php may reveal server paths; a normally executed empty response is not disclosure.

vulnerability.zh: Web 根目录公开 Composer 清单可能暴露精确包版本和私有仓库，源码形式返回自动加载文件还会泄露目录结构。文件存在但由 PHP 正常执行、响应为空且无内容泄露时，影响不能按源码暴露计算。
vulnerability.en: Public Composer manifests may reveal exact package versions and private repositories, while source delivery of autoload files can expose directory structure. A file that executes normally and returns no content is not source disclosure.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录随机 JSON、lock 和 PHP 路径的错误基线；2. 逐项请求原始名称并检查 Content-Type、正文起始和下载行为；3. 对 JSON 解析包字段，对 PHP 仅在源码文本出现时记录。空响应、重定向首页和统一错误属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record error baselines for random JSON, lock, and PHP paths. 2. Request original names one at a time and inspect Content-Type, body prefix, and download behavior. 3. Parse package fields in JSON and record PHP only when source text appears. Empty responses, homepage redirects, and generic errors are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 将 Web 根指向 public 目录而不是项目根目录；2. 通过服务器规则拒绝 composer 文件和 PHP 源码下载；3. 在部署流水线扫描公开路径与镜像层，并将私有仓库凭证迁移到密钥管理。
mitigation.en: 1. Point the web root to the public directory rather than the project root. 2. Deny Composer files and PHP source downloads at the server. 3. Scan public paths and image layers during deployment and move private-repository credentials to secret management.

title.zh: 建立 PHP 路径基线

description.zh: 比较不存在的 JSON、lock 和 PHP 文件响应，记录正常执行与源码下载差异。
description.en: Compare responses for nonexistent JSON, lock, and PHP files and record differences between execution and source download.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始文件名检查状态、类型、正文开头和重定向链。
description.en: Use original filenames one at a time and inspect status, type, body prefix, and redirect chain.

attackChain.payload:
composer.json
composer.lock
autoload.php

description.zh: 解析 Composer 包字段，或确认 autoload.php 以文本返回而不是被正常执行。
description.en: Parse Composer package fields or confirm that autoload.php is returned as text rather than executed normally.

review.rationale: 原集合是 Composer 相关公开路径候选，应归入信息收集而非业务逻辑。

prerequisites.zh: 在自有测试部署中确认 Ruby 应用 base path、静态服务和 fallback 行为，逐个低速请求 Gemfile 候选。
prerequisites.en: Confirm Ruby application base path, static serving, and fallback behavior in an owned deployment, requesting Gemfile candidates individually at low rate.

prerequisites.zh: 以 Bundler/gemspec 语法解析响应，并预设 source、git、path、精确版本和内部 gem 名称的脱敏规则。
prerequisites.en: Parse responses with Bundler or gemspec syntax and predefine redaction for source, git, path, exact versions, and internal gem names.

analysis.zh: 阳性是 Web 服务返回真实可解析的 Gemfile、lockfile 或 gemspec，并披露部署使用的依赖或内部源。HTTP 200 的 HTML fallback、仓库公开文档、空响应、错误页包含 Gemfile、目录列表仅显示文件名、样例项目或无法解析的文本都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the web service returning an authentic, parseable Gemfile, lockfile, or gemspec that discloses deployed dependencies or internal sources. An HTML fallback with HTTP 200, public repository documentation, empty response, an error page mentioning Gemfile, a directory list showing only a filename, sample project, or unparsable text is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个真实 Bundler 文件被确认后停止，不继续请求 .bundle、vendor/cache 或应用源码。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one authentic Bundler file; do not continue to .bundle, vendor/cache, or application source.

opsecTips.zh: 删除捕获文件与解析数据，清除缓存/访问日志，撤销测试源凭据并收紧静态路径配置。
opsecTips.en: Delete captured files and parse data, clear caches and access logs, revoke test-source credentials, and tighten static-path configuration.

name.zh: Ruby Bundler 清单文件探测

description.zh: 检查 Gemfile、Gemfile.lock 和 gemspec 是否被 Web 服务公开并泄露 Ruby 依赖、源地址或内部 gem 信息。
description.en: Checks whether Gemfile, Gemfile.lock, and gemspec files are web-accessible and disclose Ruby dependencies, source URLs, or internal gems.

overview.zh: 原集合对应 Bundler 的依赖声明、锁定解析和 gem 元数据。验证应确认文本结构而非仅看状态码，并重点检查 source、git、path、平台和精确版本是否泄露内部开发信息。
overview.en: The original set covers Bundler dependency declarations, locked resolution, and gem metadata. Validation confirms text structure rather than status alone and reviews source, git, path, platform, and exact-version data for internal details.

vulnerability.zh: 公开 Gemfile 或锁文件可暴露私有 gem 名称、内部 Git 地址和组件版本，为供应链攻击或组件漏洞枚举提供线索。若响应是 Rails 路由页、错误模板或公开开源项目清单，则不能直接报告生产秘密泄露。
vulnerability.en: Public Gemfiles or lockfiles may reveal private gem names, internal Git URLs, and component versions, informing supply-chain attacks or component enumeration. Rails route pages, error templates, and intentionally public open-source manifests are not production-secret leaks.

exploitation.zh: 1. 获取随机路径与 Rails 404 页面指纹；2. 逐项请求原始 Bundler 文件名并限制响应体大小；3. 查验 source、GEM、DEPENDENCIES 和规格字段，结合部署归属确认敏感性。统一页面、源码仓库公开副本或无解析结构属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Fingerprint a random path and the Rails 404 page. 2. Request original Bundler filenames one at a time with a body-size limit. 3. Inspect source, GEM, DEPENDENCIES, and specification fields and assess deployment ownership. Generic pages, public repository copies, and unparseable content are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 只把 Rails public 目录暴露给 Web 服务器；2. 从静态发布物和对象存储排除 Gemfile、锁文件及 gemspec；3. 清理私有源凭据，生成内部 SBOM 并对发布产物做敏感路径检查。
mitigation.en: 1. Expose only the Rails public directory through the web server. 2. Exclude Gemfiles, lockfiles, and gemspec files from static releases and object storage. 3. Remove private-source credentials, generate an internal SBOM, and scan release artifacts for sensitive paths.

title.zh: 指纹化 Rails 回退页

description.zh: 记录随机路径、路由错误与静态 404 的状态、长度、标题和正文哈希。
description.en: Record status, length, title, and body hash for random paths, route errors, and static 404 responses.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 Gemfile 与 gemspec 名称，检查响应类型和下载大小。
description.en: Use original Gemfile and gemspec names one at a time and inspect response type and download size.

attackChain.payload:
Gemfile
Gemfile.lock
.gemspec

description.zh: 确认 source、GEM 与 DEPENDENCIES 等区段，并判断内容是否属于当前部署。
description.en: Confirm source, GEM, and DEPENDENCIES sections and determine whether content belongs to the current deployment.

review.rationale: 原命令是 Ruby Bundler 文件名探测载荷，应归入信息收集。

prerequisites.zh: 限定到授权 Java 部署的 Web 根和上下文路径，建立随机路径、默认 servlet 和前端 fallback 基线。
prerequisites.en: Scope the web root and context path of an authorized Java deployment, establishing random-path, default-servlet, and frontend-fallback baselines.

prerequisites.zh: 使用 Maven/Gradle 解析规则确认项目、依赖、插件、仓库和 properties 结构，并定义凭据与内网 URL 脱敏。
prerequisites.en: Confirm project, dependency, plugin, repository, and properties structures with Maven or Gradle parsing rules, defining redaction for credentials and internal URLs.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 pom.xml 或 Gradle 文件以真实可解析内容公开，并与运行部署的构建坐标/依赖相符；敏感影响需有内部仓库、插件、版本或属性。状态 200、XML 错误页、公开示例、前端 index、空 properties、文件名提示或源码镜像按设计公开都不是部署配置泄露。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires pom.xml or a Gradle file to be publicly returned as authentic, parseable content matching the deployed build coordinates or dependencies; sensitive impact requires internal repositories, plugins, versions, or properties. HTTP 200, an XML error page, public sample, frontend index, empty properties, filename hint, or an intentionally public source mirror is not deployment-configuration exposure.

opsecTips.zh: 首次确认一个真实构建文件后停止，不遍历 target、build、仓库缓存或源码路径。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one authentic build file; do not enumerate target, build, repository caches, or source paths.

opsecTips.zh: 删除下载与解析结果，清理 CDN/服务器缓存和访问日志，轮换测试仓库凭据并修正静态资源白名单。
opsecTips.en: Delete downloads and parse results, clear CDN and server caches and access logs, rotate test-repository credentials, and correct the static-resource allowlist.

name.zh: Java Maven 与 Gradle 构建文件探测
name.en: Java Maven and Gradle Build-File Discovery

description.zh: 检查 pom.xml、Gradle 脚本和属性文件是否可公开访问并泄露 Java 依赖、插件或内部仓库配置。
description.en: Checks whether pom.xml, Gradle scripts, and property files are publicly accessible and disclose Java dependencies, plugins, or internal repositories.

overview.zh: 该集合同时覆盖 Maven 与 Gradle 项目配置。有效证据应包含可解析的 project、dependencies、plugins 或 repository 结构，并区分实际服务清单与文档示例、源码镜像和前端路由回退。
overview.en: This set covers both Maven and Gradle project configuration. Valid evidence includes parseable project, dependency, plugin, or repository structures and distinguishes deployed manifests from documentation samples, source mirrors, and client-route fallbacks.

vulnerability.zh: 生产站点公开构建文件可能泄露组件精确版本、内部仓库、插件任务和构建属性，帮助识别已知漏洞或供应链边界。只看到 XML 页面、Gradle 关键词或公开示例项目不代表当前应用配置泄露。
vulnerability.en: Public production build files may reveal exact component versions, internal repositories, plugin tasks, and build properties, informing known-vulnerability or supply-chain analysis. An XML page, Gradle keywords, or a public sample project does not prove current-application disclosure.

exploitation.zh: 1. 建立随机 XML、Gradle 和 properties 路径的错误指纹；2. 逐项请求原始文件名，限制响应体并记录缓存来源；3. 使用 Maven 或 Gradle 结构规则验证 group、artifact、dependency 和 repository。通用 XML、文档示例与缓存旧文件属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Fingerprint errors for random XML, Gradle, and properties paths. 2. Request original filenames one at a time, limit body size, and record cache source. 3. Validate group, artifact, dependency, and repository structures using Maven or Gradle rules. Generic XML, documentation examples, and stale cached files are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 将构建上下文与运行时静态目录完全分离；2. 从 WAR、镜像和 CDN 发布清单中排除构建脚本与仓库配置；3. 对依赖信息使用内部 SBOM 管理，并轮换任何暴露的仓库凭证。
mitigation.en: 1. Fully separate build context from runtime static directories. 2. Exclude build scripts and repository configuration from WAR files, images, and CDN manifests. 3. Manage dependency data with internal SBOMs and rotate any exposed repository credentials.

title.zh: 建立构建文件误报基线

description.zh: 请求随机 XML、Gradle 和属性文件名，记录应用路由与静态错误响应。
description.en: Request random XML, Gradle, and properties filenames and record application-route and static-error responses.

title.zh: 探测 Maven 与 Gradle 文件

description.zh: 逐项使用原始构建文件名进行低速请求，并保留缓存与内容类型信息。
description.en: Use original build filenames one at a time at low rate and retain cache and content-type information.

attackChain.payload:
pom.xml
build.gradle
settings.gradle
gradle.properties
build.gradle.kts
settings.gradle.kts

description.zh: 解析依赖、插件和仓库结构，确认文件对应当前部署而非示例内容。
description.en: Parse dependency, plugin, and repository structures and confirm the file belongs to the current deployment rather than sample content.

review.rationale: 原列表是 Java 构建与依赖文件路径，应改归信息收集。

prerequisites.zh: 使用自有对称测试密钥、固定有效密文和同一解密端点，确保变体长度、编码、连接与请求上下文一致。
prerequisites.en: Use an owned symmetric test key, fixed valid ciphertext, and one decryption endpoint, ensuring equal variant length, encoding, connection, and request context.

prerequisites.zh: 对受控末块字节变体重复采集状态、正文、关闭行为和时延，并以已知 padding/MAC 真值标注。
prerequisites.en: Repeatedly collect status, body, close behavior, and timing for controlled final-block byte variants, labeling them with known padding and MAC ground truth.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具证据是 padding 有效与无效类别形成稳定可区分的响应或时延簇，并在重复样本中与测试真值相关。响应含 Invalid padding 字样、一次错误变化、密文长度不同、Base64 解析失败、限流、网络抖动或 MAC 和 padding 统一失败都不能证明 oracle。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is padding-valid and padding-invalid classes forming stable distinguishable response or timing clusters correlated with test ground truth across repetitions. Invalid padding text, one changed error, different ciphertext lengths, Base64 parse failure, rate limiting, network jitter, or unified MAC and padding failure does not prove an oracle.

opsecTips.zh: 最小变体集达到预设区分置信度后停止，不进入自适应明文恢复或批量查询。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the minimal variant set reaches the predefined distinguishing confidence; do not proceed to adaptive plaintext recovery or bulk queries.

opsecTips.zh: 删除密文、测试密钥副本与分类结果，清除连接缓存并恢复统一错误、恒时处理和限速。
opsecTips.en: Delete ciphertexts, test-key copies, and classification results, clear connection caches, and restore uniform errors, constant-time handling, and rate limits.

name.zh: 对称加密 Padding Oracle 错误签名库

description.zh: 整理填充、解密和 MAC 失败文本用于响应分类；该集合是分析工具输入，不是构造密文的攻击载荷。
description.en: Catalogs padding, decryption, and MAC failure text for response classification; the set is analysis-tool input rather than crafted ciphertext payloads.

overview.zh: 原内容全部是多语言错误字符串，适合对日志和响应进行标签化。真正的 padding oracle 测试需要对同一密文做受控字节变异，并比较状态、正文、连接行为和时序，不能只搜索关键词。
overview.en: The original content is a multilingual error-string catalog suitable for labeling logs and responses. A real padding-oracle test mutates controlled bytes in the same ciphertext and compares status, body, connection behavior, and timing rather than merely searching keywords.

vulnerability.zh: 如果服务对有效填充、无效填充和 MAC 失败给出稳定可区分结果，攻击者可能获得解密或伪造所需的 oracle。日志中存在“Invalid padding”或接口偶发 500，并不能证明远程调用者可观察分支。
vulnerability.en: If valid padding, invalid padding, and MAC failures produce stable distinguishable outcomes, a service may expose an oracle useful for decryption or forgery. An Invalid padding log entry or occasional 500 does not prove that remote callers can observe the branch.

exploitation.zh: 1. 将原始错误文本导入响应与日志聚类工具；2. 使用授权测试密钥对等长密文做单字节受控变异并重复请求；3. 比较状态、长度、时延分布和连接关闭方式。网关错误、负载均衡差异、限流与日志内部可见但客户端不可见均属误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Import original error text into response and log clustering. 2. With an authorized test key, make single-byte controlled mutations to equal-length ciphertexts and repeat requests. 3. Compare status, length, latency distribution, and connection closure. Gateway errors, load-balancer differences, throttling, and server-only log distinctions are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用认证加密模式并避免自行组合 CBC 与 MAC；2. 对所有解密失败返回不可区分结果并采用恒定时间处理；3. 在弃用旧密文格式期间加入速率限制、密钥轮换与 oracle 差异回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use authenticated-encryption modes and avoid custom CBC and MAC composition. 2. Return indistinguishable failures with constant-time processing. 3. During legacy-format retirement, add rate limits, key rotation, and regression tests for oracle distinctions.

description.zh: 固定端点、密文长度和网络条件，定义状态、正文长度、时延与断连指标。
description.en: Fix endpoint, ciphertext length, and network conditions and define status, body length, timing, and disconnect metrics.

description.zh: 把原始错误消息导入分析工具作为聚类标签，不把文本当密文发送。
description.en: Import original error messages into the analysis tool as clustering labels rather than sending them as ciphertext.

description.zh: 对受控字节变异重复采样并做统计对照，排除网关、限流和网络抖动。
description.en: Repeat controlled byte mutations with statistical controls to exclude gateways, throttling, and network jitter.

review.rationale: 原记录仅包含错误签名，缺少密文构造与请求位置，应归入密码学响应分析工具。

prerequisites.zh: 为低权限合成用户签发一枚有效 JWT，固定 issuer、audience、时效、算法、kid 和只读 canary 端点。
prerequisites.en: Issue one valid JWT for a low-privilege synthetic user, pinning issuer, audience, lifetime, algorithm, kid, and a read-only canary endpoint.

prerequisites.zh: 仅移除、截断或异常化签名部分，保持 Header/Payload 与请求上下文一致，并采集解析、验证和授权阶段日志。
prerequisites.en: Only remove, truncate, or abnormalize the signature segment while keeping header, payload, and request context fixed, collecting parsing, validation, and authorization-stage logs.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求缺失或异常签名的 token 通过服务端验证并以合成主体读取认证 canary，日志显示授权发生在签名成功之前或签名被跳过。Header 可解码、解析器识别 alg、错误信息不同、返回匿名 200、网关接收后资源端拒绝、或合法基线成功都不是签名绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a token with a missing or abnormal signature to pass server validation and read the authenticated canary as the synthetic principal, with logs showing authorization before signature success or skipped verification. A decodable header, parser recognizing alg, different errors, anonymous HTTP 200, gateway acceptance followed by resource-server rejection, or success of the valid baseline is not signature bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个无效签名 token 首次读取只读 canary 后停止，不篡改权限 claims 或调用写接口。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one invalidly signed token first reads the read-only canary; do not tamper with privilege claims or invoke write endpoints.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销测试 token 和账户，清除验证/JWKS 缓存与诊断日志，并恢复签名必需和算法固定。
opsecTips.en: Revoke test tokens and the account, clear validation and JWKS caches and diagnostic logs, and restore mandatory signatures and algorithm pinning.

name.zh: JWT 签名验证负向测试

description.zh: 使用缺失或异常签名的 JWT 结构验证服务端是否在解析声明后仍严格执行算法与签名校验。
description.en: Uses JWT structures with missing or abnormal signatures to test whether a server strictly enforces algorithm and signature validation after parsing claims.

overview.zh: 原集合包含仅有头部和空签名的 JWT 片段，适合作为验证器负向输入。测试必须从正常低权限令牌出发，并保持 issuer、audience、时间和请求上下文一致，避免把解析成功误认为验证成功。
overview.en: The original set contains header-only JWT fragments with empty signatures for validator negative testing. Testing starts from a valid low-privilege token and holds issuer, audience, time, and request context constant so parsing is not confused with validation.

vulnerability.zh: 若服务端在缺少有效签名时仍信任 alg、kid 或权限声明，攻击者可伪造身份或提升权限。解码器能显示头部、前端接受字符串或接口返回统一 200 都不代表受保护操作通过。
vulnerability.en: If a server trusts alg, kid, or privilege claims without a valid signature, an attacker may forge identity or escalate privileges. A decoder showing the header, client acceptance, or a generic 200 response does not mean a protected operation succeeded.

exploitation.zh: 1. 用正常低权限 JWT 访问受保护接口并记录拒绝或允许基线；2. 逐项提交原始空签名结构，其他请求条件保持一致；3. 核对服务端主体、授权决策与审计日志。只有伪造令牌获得超出基线的权限才成立，解析错误差异属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Access a protected endpoint with a valid low-privilege JWT and record the authorization baseline. 2. Submit original empty-signature structures one at a time with all other request conditions unchanged. 3. Verify server principal, authorization decision, and audit logs. Confirm only privileges beyond baseline; parser-error differences are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在读取任何声明前验证签名并固定每个客户端允许的算法；2. 严格验证 issuer、audience、时间与密钥用途，禁止从不可信头部直接选取文件或 URL；3. 对空签名、截断令牌和算法混淆建立负向测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Verify the signature before using any claim and fix allowed algorithms per client. 2. Strictly validate issuer, audience, time, and key usage and never select files or URLs directly from untrusted headers. 3. Add negative tests for empty signatures, truncated tokens, and algorithm confusion.

title.zh: 建立低权限 JWT 基线

description.zh: 使用合法低权限令牌访问受保护接口，记录主体、权限和审计事件。
description.en: Use a valid low-privilege token on a protected endpoint and record principal, permissions, and audit events.

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 JWT 片段进行请求，保持 issuer、audience 与接口不变。
description.en: Use original JWT fragments one at a time while keeping issuer, audience, and endpoint unchanged.

attackChain.payload:
eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.
eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.
eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCIsImtpZCI6L2Rldi9udWxsfQ.

description.zh: 从服务端日志核对验签与权限决策，排除仅解析成功或客户端显示变化。
description.en: Verify signature and authorization decisions in server logs, excluding parsing success and client display changes.

review.rationale: 原命令是缺失签名的 JWT 负向输入，应归入 JWT 安全类别。

prerequisites.zh: 确认用户输入到达的具体正则、语言引擎和调用路径，在资源受限的独立进程中运行。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the exact regex, language engine, and call path reached by user input, running it in a resource-limited isolated process.

prerequisites.zh: 把固定长度字符串作为初筛后，生成递增长度的失败匹配、成功匹配和随机后缀对照并重复计时。
prerequisites.en: After using fixed-length strings for screening, generate increasing-length failed matches, successful matches, and random-suffix controls and time them repeatedly.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求失败匹配成本随长度可重复地超线性增长，并由 CPU/profile 定位到目标正则；固定样本只能提示候选。一次超时、长度相同输入差异、网络延迟、GC、服务器负载、请求排队、异常处理或安全超时主动终止均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires failed-match cost to grow reproducibly superlinearly with length and CPU profiling to localize it to the target regex; fixed samples only identify candidates. One timeout, differences among equal-length inputs, network latency, garbage collection, server load, request queueing, exception handling, or an active safety timeout is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 曲线首次越过预设 CPU/时延阈值后停止，不发送最大长度或并发请求。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the curve first crosses the predefined CPU or latency threshold; do not send maximum-length or concurrent requests.

opsecTips.zh: 终止隔离进程，清除请求队列、输入和性能 trace，恢复资源限制并替换风险正则。
opsecTips.en: Terminate the isolated process, clear request queues, inputs, and performance traces, restore resource limits, and replace the risky regex.

name.zh: 通用正则表达式拒绝服务输入

description.zh: 使用固定长度的近似失败字符串筛查正则匹配路径，并以可重复的资源增长而非单次超时判定 ReDoS。
description.en: Uses fixed-length near-failing strings to screen regex paths and determines ReDoS from reproducible resource growth rather than a single timeout.

overview.zh: 该集合比 JavaScript 专项条目更通用，提供 x 字符结尾变体以触发失败匹配。由于长度基本固定，它适合初筛，不足以独立绘制复杂度曲线；确认阶段仍需生成递增长度样本。
overview.en: This set is more generic than the JavaScript-specific entry and provides x-string suffix variants for failed matches. Because lengths are mostly fixed, it supports screening but not a complete complexity curve; confirmation still requires increasing samples.

vulnerability.zh: 存在嵌套量词、回溯歧义或重叠分支的正则可能在近似输入上消耗大量 CPU 或线程，造成应用层拒绝服务。某个固定字符串慢一次可能来自缓存未命中、网络或下游服务，不能直接定性。
vulnerability.en: Regexes with nested quantifiers, ambiguous backtracking, or overlapping alternatives may consume excessive CPU or threads on near-matching input and cause application denial of service. One slow fixed string may instead reflect cache, network, or downstream behavior.

exploitation.zh: 1. 对正常输入和随机不存在输入记录端到端与正则内部计时；2. 逐项提交原始字符串进行初筛，命中后生成逐级长度样本；3. 重复测量 CPU、线程与延迟斜率并设置停止阈值。单次慢响应、冷启动和限流页面属于误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record end-to-end and internal regex timing for normal and random nonmatching input. 2. Submit original strings one at a time for screening, then generate increasing lengths for candidates. 3. Repeat CPU, thread, and latency-slope measurements with a stop threshold. Single slow responses, cold starts, and throttle pages are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 简化表达式并优先采用保证线性时间的引擎或解析器；2. 对输入长度、匹配时间和请求并发设置上限；3. 在代码审查与 CI 中检测危险结构，并为高风险端点增加资源斜率回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Simplify expressions and prefer engines or parsers with linear-time guarantees. 2. Cap input length, matching time, and request concurrency. 3. Detect risky structures in review and CI and add resource-slope regression tests for high-risk endpoints.

description.zh: 采集正常与随机失败输入的正则内部耗时、CPU 和请求端到端延迟。
description.en: Collect internal regex time, CPU, and end-to-end latency for normal and random failed input.

description.zh: 逐项提交原始固定长度变体，设置严格超时并标记稳定变慢的路径。
description.en: Submit original fixed-length variants one at a time with a strict timeout and flag consistently slower paths.
